en.postBody:
Check out Tulum Festivals 2025 if you are looking for Zamna Events in 2025

Unlock the Night: Zamna Festival 2024

This year, Zamna opens its arms to a lineup that promises to exceed all expectations. Each event, curated and hosted in the heart of the jungle.

What is Zamna Festival?

Zamna Tulum is a music festival in Tulum, Mexico, known for its electronic music events. Set in the Tulum jungle, it offers a unique mix of music and nature. The festival brings international DJs and hosts various events, each with a unique vibe. Zamna Tulum hosts various events spread across different days, featuring iconic DJs such as Tale of Us, Adam Beyer, Blond:ish, Maceo Plex and others in events like Afterlife & Tomorrowland Core, Keinemusik.

Multi-Pass and VIP

For those looking to immerse themselves in multiple events, Zamna offers a multi-pass ticket – a cost-effective option that grants access to 3 different events or for 3 entrances for same event. Multi-Pass tickets for Afterlife are no longer available make sure to keep that in mind when purchasing a Multi-Pass.

And for larger groups or those seeking a touch of luxury, table reservations in the VIP section are available. Experience the festival in style and comfort, with exclusive amenities and better views of the stage. To reserve your table or for more information on ticketing options, reach out to us directly.

Getting to Zamna: Transportation Options

Taxis: Taxis are readily available but can be expensive, particularly during high season. A typical fare from Zamna to Tulum downtown can reach up to $50 USD. Always agree on the fare before starting your journey to avoid any surprises.

Private Drivers: For larger groups or those seeking convenience, arranging a private driver can be a stress-free option. Not only will you have a guaranteed ride to and from the event, but you can also travel on your own schedule without the worry of waiting or overpaying for a taxi.

Zamna Parties:

TARAKA Tulum by GORDO

TARAKA Tulum by Gordo, happening on December 29, 2023, is the opening party for the Zamna Festival. Gordo, whose real name is Diego Moreno. Gordo has been a prominent figure in the underground electronic music scene, with his roots in Mexico City’s nightlife culture. His music, often described as a blend of house and techno with a Latin American twist, is expected to set a vibrant tone at Zamna Tulum. Tickets are available in General and VIP categories, offering varied experiences for party-goers.

Date: December 29, 2023

Music: Tech House, Afro House, Latin House

Taraka Lineup: Anden B2B Rinzen, Gioli & Assia, Gordo, Harvy Valencia B2B Jay De Lys, Joris Voorn.

Tickets:

  • General Early Bird: $100 USD
  • VIP Early Bird: $200 USD

Buy Tickets

Anjunadeep Open Air Tulum

Making its debut in Mexico with "Anjunadeep Open Air Tulum" at Zamna Tulum, the label brings its deeper sound to the heart of the jungle. Founded in 2005 by the globally acclaimed trio Above & Beyond and their manager James Grant, Anjunadeep has evolved from its roots as a platform for the deeper and progressive shades of their sets into one of the electronic music world’s most respected labels. Anjunadeep events are known for their warm, inclusive vibes, where fans known as the Anjuna Family – come together to celebrate music and connection.

Date: December 29, 2023

Music: Deep House, House, Melodic House

Adjunadeep Lineup:

Cri (Dj Set), Dosem, Eli & Fur, Simon Doty

Tickets:

  • General 1st Release: $120 USD
  • VIP Early Bird: $200 USD

Buy Tickets

ADRIATIQUE present X Tulum

Adriatique, the Swiss DJ duo, is renowned for their dynamic performances and deep, melodic sound that transcends traditional electronic music boundaries. Their event, X Tulum, is scheduled for December 30, 2023. Adrian Shala and Adrian Schweizer, have been captivating audiences worldwide with their unique sound since 2009, blending various elements of techno, house, and other electronic sub-genres. They are also known for their record label, Siamese, which they use as a platform to showcase their musical vision and host their own events.

Date: December 30th, 2023

Music: Melodic Techno

Artist Lineup: Adriatique, Innellea, Shimza, Ivory (More TBA)

Tickets:

  • General 1st Release: $120 USD
  • VIP Early Bird: $200 USD

Buy Tickets

ZAMNA NYE Presents: PAUL KALKBRENNER (LIVE)

Zamna Tulum is set to host New Year's Eve celebration with Paul Kalkbrenner on December 31, 2023. Renowned for his dynamic live performances, Kalkbrenner will headline the event, accompanied by a lineup of notable artists like Camelphat and Agents Of Time, offering a blend of techno and house music in the jungle. If you dont have your NYE plans yet this is a great opportunity to celebrate all night dancing! Make sure to check out our NYE Tulum Guide

Date: December 31, 2023

Music: Techno, Melodic Techno, House

Zamna NYE Lineup:

Paul Kalkbrenner, Camelphat, Agents Of Time, Henri Bergmann, Armonica, Silver Panda, The Element, Toto Chiavetta, Wurtz

Tickets:

  • GENERAL 2nd Release: $140 USD
  • VIP 1st Release: $300 USD

Buy Tickets

ANTS Tulum

ANTS, the Ibiza-based brand, is arriving in the new year in style with an event at Zamna on January 2nd. This date is a part of its world tour with the ANTS brand. The event in Tulum is featuring a lineup of artists from the techno and house music scenes including Adam Beyer, Andrea Olivia, Joris Vorn and others promising a night of unforgettable grooves. ANTS parties are known for their immersive atmospheres, where the ANTS colony (the audience) is encouraged to lose themselves in the music and become part of the show. We are also very interested to see what High Scream Production company of Ushuaia and Hi Ibiza will bring to this event, they are known for impressive stage designs.

Date: January 2, 2024

Music: Tech House, House

Artist Lineup: Adam Beyer, Andrea Oliva, Chelina Manuhutu, Francisco Allendes, Ilario Alicante, Joris Voorn

Tickets:

  • General Early Bird: $100 USD
  • VIP Early Bird: $200 USD

Buy Tickets

Abracadabra Tulum

Abracadabra coming to Zamna on January 2nd. Abracadabra is known for its magical events and transformative experiences that blend music, art, and sustainability. Founded by BLOND:ISH (Vivie-Ann Bakos), the event series and record label is built on the ethos of mindful partying, where events are not only a space for enjoying music but also for exploring eco-conscious and sustainable practices.

Date: January 2, 2024

Music: Tech House, House

Artist Lineup: Blond:ish, Adam Ten B2B Mita Gami, Ben Sterling, Notre Dame

  • General 2nd Release: $100 USD
  • VIP Early Bird: $200 USD

Buy Tickets

AFTERLIFE Tulum 2024

Afterlife is set to impress the audience once again in the jungles of Tulum on January 4th and January 6th 2024. Afterlife is an event series and record label created by the duo Tale Of Us, also known as Carmine Conte and Matteo Milleri. The concept of Afterlife is a mesmerizing journey to an immersive music experience, which they describe as "an odyssey through the realm of consciousness.” The Afterlife events are known for their immersive visual and auditory experiences.

Dates: January 4th, 2024, January 6th, 2024

Music: Melodic Techno

Afterlife Tulum Lineup 4th January:

‍Anyma presents Genesys, Tale Of Us, Adriatique, Mind Against, Cassian, Brina Knauss, Eynka, Rebūke, Recondite (Live), 8Kays, David Lindmer, Stylo, Henri Bergmann, The Element, DYZEN, 19:26, Anii, Afshin Nomadi, Wurtz

Afterlife Tulum Lineup 6th January:

Mrak presents We Don't Follow, Tale Of Us, Camelphat, Argy, Chris Avantgarde, Layla Benitez B2B Kasia, Omnya, Colyn, Massano, Woo York (Live), Alfa Romero, Hunter/Game, Olympe, Øostil, Armonica, Magdalena, Toto Chiavetta, Ruback, Glowal

‍

Tickets:

  • January 4th: LAST TICKETS
  • VIP - SOLD OUT

Buy Tickets

  • January 6th: SOLD OUT
  • VIP - SOLD OUT

Buy Tickets

Circoloco Tulum

Circoloco, a name that has become emblematic of Ibiza's vibrant party scene is making a return for the third consecutive year to Tulum at the Zamna. The event is scheduled to take place on January 8, 2024. Circoloco is globally recognized for featuring some of the most innovative and exciting names in the techno and house scenes. Circoloco, is one of the longest underground dance brands running for over two decades.

Date: January 8, 2024

Music: Techno ,Tech House

Circoloco Tulum Lineup:

‍Anotr, Ben Ufo, Blond:ish, Bradley Zero, Carlita, Dj Tennis, Invt, Konstantin, Maceo Plex, Mano Le Tough, Map.Ache, O.Bee vs Tomas Station, Pawsa, Rony Seikaly, Seth Troxler.

Tickets:

  • General 2nd Release: $140 USD
  • VIP 1st Release: $300 USD

Buy Tickets

KEINEMUSIK Tulum

KEINEMUSIK, a Berlin-based record label, collective, and multifaceted music project, returns with the Kloud to Tulum on January 9, 2024. The collective, consisting of Rampa, &ME, Adam Port. The KEINEMUSIK event in Tulum is set to be a vibrant showcase of the collective’s signature sound, which blends various electronic music genres with a consistently fresh and innovative approach.

Date: January 9, 2024

Music: Afro House, House, Melodic Techno

Keinemusik Lineup: &ME, Rampa, and Adam Port with more To be Announced

Tickets:

  • General 2nd Release: $140 USD
  • VIP 1st Release: $300 USD

Buy Tickets

ZAMNA Presents: FISHER

Get ready to lose it with Fisher, the Australian tech-house sensation, as he brings his energy and bouncy beats to Zamna Tulum on January 10th, 2024. Fisher is an Australian music producer and DJ, known for his tracks such as "Losing It" and "You Little Beauty." His music is characterized by its energetic and bouncy tech-house style, often featuring catchy vocal hooks and driving basslines.

Date: January 10th, 2024

Music: Tech House

Fisher Tulum Lineup:

Fisher, Hugel, Tom and Collins, Wade and a special guest.

Tickets:

  • GENERAL 1st Release - $120 USD,
  • VIP Early Bird - $200 USD

Buy Tickets

‍

MATHAME

On January 10th, Mathame is bringing their signature cinematic techno to Zamna Tulum, presenting their AV:SHOW in Mexico for the first time. The Italian duo, Amedeo and Matteo Giovanelli, will combine their distinct techno beats with an immersive visual experience, inviting attendees into the Mathame Universe. For those unfamiliar with their work, Mathame's Cercle set is a recommended watch to grasp the essence of their sound, characterized by a blend of rhythmic precision and evocative, cinematic melodies. Mathame will be accompanied by Korolova, Chloe Caillet, and Lyke.

Date: January 10th, 2024

Music: Melodic Techno

Artist Lineup: Mathame, Korolova, Chloe Caillet, Lyke

Tickets:

  • GENERAL 1st Release - $120 USD,
  • VIP Early Bird - $200 USD

Buy Tickets

RÜFÜS DU SOL Tulum 2024 (DJ Set)

RÜFÜS DU SOL, an Australian electronic music group, is known for their emotive and melodic, yet floor-filling productions. Comprising Tyrone Lindqvist, Jon George, and James Hunt, RÜFÜS DU SOL has captivated global audiences since their debut, with their album "Atlas" soaring to number 1 on the Australian Albums Chart back in 2013. In Tulum, RÜFÜS DU SOL is set to take the stage on January 11, 2024, at Zamna Tulum. With hits like "Innerbloom" and "Alive," , Rufus Du Sol promises a night of euphoric melodies and soul-stirring beats

Dates: January 11th, 2024

Music: Melodic House, House

Artist Lineup: Rufus Du Sol, Astra Club (Dj Tennis B2B Carlita), Jimi Jules, Roman Flugel, Dj Puma

Tickets:

  • General 2° Release: 140 USD
  • VIP 1° Release: 300 USD

Buy Tickets

‍

Tomorrowland presents CORE Tulum

Tomorrowland brings the world premiere of a brand-new CORE stage to Tulum on January 13 & January 20, 2024. With a history that spans over a decade, Tomorrowland has become a big player in electronic music scene, and its expansion to Tulum ensures attendees will witness a blend of musical excellence and natural beauty. Brina Knauss is set to make her comeback, joining a roster that includes Diplo, Disclosure's DJ set, HAAi, and Mind Against on January 13th. The following week on January 20th, Jaguar, Kolsch, and Vintage Culture will take the stage. Ticket prices for CORE are noted to be higher, signaling an elevated experience, and attendees can expect more artist announcements to round out an already exciting lineup.

Dates: January 13th, 2024, January 20th, 2024

Music: TBA

Tomorrowland Core Lineup:

13th January: Afriqua (Dj Set), Badsista, Bibi Seck, Boys Noize (Disco Set), Dan Shake,Diplo, Disclosure (Dj-set), Elif, Emjie, Eran Hersh, Haai, Henri Bergmann, Kitty Amor, Kotiēr, Lilihell, Lp Giobbi, Mind Against, Øostil, Vongold

20th January: Agents Of Time, Atrip, Badmoiselle, Brina Knauss, Capoon, Cellini, Dino Lenny, Dj Boring, Eagles & Butterflies, Golden Hour, Iñigo Vontier B2b Thomass Jackson (Label), Jaguar, Kölsch, Krystal Klear, Mura Masa (Dj-set), Olympe, Suricata, Todd Edwards, Vintage Culture

Tickets:

  • January 13th: Third Wave - 170 USD
  • Second Wave VIP - 400 USD

Buy Tickets

  • January 20th: Third Wave - 170 USD,
  • Second Wave VIP - 400 USD

Buy Tickets

Renaissance at Zamna Tulum

Renaissance, a globally recognized club brand and record label, has been a significant player in the electronic music scene since its inception in 1992. Not only has it staged major festivals and international club nights in over 30 countries. The label has recently featured big names like Solomun, Tale Of Us, Maceo Plex, and Adam Beyer. The Renaissance event at Zamna Tulum on January 27th will feature Oliver Heldens playing twice—once under his own melodic house style and again as his techno alias Hi-Lo, known for a more bassline-driven, underground sound. Kaskade will also deliver his special Redux show, a nod to his roots in celebration of the 10th anniversary tour, offering fans a classic vibe.

Date: January 27th, 2024

Music: Mix of electronic music

Renaissance Lineup:

Jungle 01: Alok presenting [Something Else], Kaskade Redux, Oliver Heldens, Solardo, Queen Rami

Jungle 02: Hi-Lo, Kas:st, Radeckt, Sasha, and a special guest

Garden: EBMATH, Sasha Carassi, The Element, Toto Chiavetta, Wurtz.

Tickets:

  • General 1st Release: $120 USD
  • VIP Early Bird: $200 USD

Buy Tickets

Closing at Zamna Tulum

Zamna Tulum's festival season is wrapping up with a big closing party on February 3rd. Artbat is back, but this time they’re not ringing in the new year — they're closing out the festival. They're joined by a strong lineup of DJs like Claptone, Korolova, and John Summit, set to play across different stages. Whether you're into melodic techno, tech house or deeper sounds, the event has something for every music fan. It's a night to come together, and celebrate the end of an amazing season at Zamna.

Date: February 3rd, 2024

Music: Mix of Electronic Music

Zamna Closing Lineup:

Jungle 01: Artbat, Argy, Fred Lenix, Korolova, Kasablanca, Mahmut Orhan

Jungle 02: Claptone, Hayden James, John Summit, Sainte Vie, Tony Y Not

Garden: Avangart Tabldot, Ermakova, Golden Hour, Soloist, Th;en, Yet More

Tickets:

  • General 1st Release: $120 USD
  • VIP Early Bird: $200 USD

Buy Tickets

Note: For the most accurate and recent updates regarding ticket availability, artist lineups, and event guidelines, please visit the official website or get in touch with the event organizers directly.

Additional Information

Planning your trip to Zamna Festival 2024? Here are some practical tips to ensure a smooth experience:

  • Accommodation: Tulum offers a range of accommodation options, from luxury resorts to budget-friendly hostels. Book in advance to secure the best deals.
  • Travel: Tulum is accessible by air, with the nearest airport being Cancún International Airport. From there, you can take a ADO bus or taxi to Tulum. Tulum Airport is also scheduled to be complete in December make sure to check flights to both.
  • Safety Protocols: The health and safety of attendees are paramount. Stay updated with the festival's health and safety guidelines.
  • Transportation: Taxis can be very expensive during a high season especially going back from the parties, if you are looking for a cheaper alternative you can catch a collectivo (van) from Tulum Downtown to Aldea Tulum for a few dollars.

Brina Knauss is set to make her comeback, joining a roster that includes Diplo, Disclosure's DJ set, HAAi, and Mind Against on January 13th. The following week on January 20th, Jaguar, Kolsch, and Vintage Culture will take the stage. Ticket prices for CORE are noted to be higher, signaling an elevated experience, and attendees can expect more artist announcements to round out an already exciting lineup.

Dates: January 13th, 2024, January 20th, 2024

Music: TBA

13th January: Afriqua (Dj Set), Badsista, Bibi Seck, Boys Noize (Disco Set), Dan Shake,Diplo, Disclosure (Dj-set), Elif, Emjie, Eran Hersh, Haai, Henri Bergmann, Kitty Amor, Kotiēr, Lilihell, Lp Giobbi, Mind Against, Øostil, Vongold

20th January: Agents Of Time, Atrip, Badmoiselle, Brina Knauss, Capoon, Cellini, Dino Lenny, Dj Boring, Eagles & Butterflies, Golden Hour, Iñigo Vontier B2b Thomass Jackson (Label), Jaguar, Kölsch, Krystal Klear, Mura Masa (Dj-set), Olympe, Suricata, Todd Edwards, Vintage Culture

Renaissance at Zamna Tulum

Renaissance, a globally recognized club brand and record label, has been a significant player in the electronic music scene since its inception in 1992. Not only has it staged major festivals and international club nights in over 30 countries. The label has recently featured big names like Solomun, Tale Of Us, Maceo Plex, and Adam Beyer. The Renaissance event at Zamna Tulum on January 27th will feature Oliver Heldens playing twice—once under his own melodic house style and again as his techno alias Hi-Lo, known for a more bassline-driven, underground sound. Kaskade will also deliver his special Redux show, a nod to his roots in celebration of the 10th anniversary tour, offering fans a classic vibe.

Date: January 27th, 2024

Music: Mix of electronic music

Renaissance Lineup:

Jungle 01: Alok presenting [Something Else], Kaskade Redux, Oliver Heldens, Solardo, Queen Rami

Jungle 02: Hi-Lo, Kas:st, Radeckt, Sasha, and a special guest

Closing at Zamna Tulum

Zamna Tulum's festival season is wrapping up with a big closing party on February 3rd. Artbat is back, but this time they’re not ringing in the new year — they're closing out the festival. They're joined by a strong lineup of DJs like Claptone, Korolova, and John Summit, set to play across different stages. Whether you're into melodic techno, tech house or deeper sounds, the event has something for every music fan. It's a night to come together, and celebrate the end of an amazing season at Zamna.

  • Accommodation: Tulum offers a range of accommodation options, from luxury resorts to budget-friendly hostels. Book in advance to secure the best deals.
  • Travel: Tulum is accessible by air, with the nearest airport being Cancún International Airport. From there, you can take a ADO bus or taxi to Tulum. Tulum Airport is also scheduled to be complete in December make sure to check flights to both.

en.h1Title: Tulum Nightlife: Best Nightclubs, Restaurants and Beachclubs
en.metaDescription: Discover Tulum's vibrant nightlife! Your guide to the hottest beach clubs, restaurants, and more. Constantly updated with the latest info.
en.metaTitle: Tulum Nightlife: Best Nightclubs, Restaurants and Beachclubs
en.name: Tulum Nightlife Guide, Top Restaurants and Beachclubs
en.postBody:
Tulum's vibrant nightlife scene is always changing with new places opening and others evolving. That's why we created this guide – to help you find the hottest spots for your perfect party in Tulum.

We're always working to improve and expand this guide for the best possible experience. This guide covers a wide range of places – each with its own vibe and price range. We hope our tips will help you pick the perfect spots and plan amazing nights out in Tulum!

Venue-Specific Days in Tulum (Low Season Focus)

Tulum’s nightlife has its own rhythm, especially during the low season. While special events or big-name DJs can sometimes attract a crowd to a particular spot, the low season operates differently. Each day of the week often corresponds to a specific venue, creating a dependable party circuit. This makes it easier to know where to go depending on the day.

Below, we’ve provided a table of venues and their corresponding days to help you decide where to go. Just remember to check in for any last-minute changes or special events that could shake things up!

{{weekly-table="/components"}}

Tulum Nightlife Changes

Tulum Nightlife used to be famous for parties that lasted all night on the beach. Now, there’s a curfew. Despite the curfew, events like full moon parties at Papaya Playa Project or weekends at Bonbonniere still offer late-night fun. Most places have to close by 1 am or 2 am. But don’t worry! There are still tons of great ways to have fun in Tulum. This guide will show you all the best spots that are still open late hours and that are fun during the day.

Hotel Zone

The Hotel Zone is Tulum’s nightlife hub! You’ll find everything from lively beach clubs to restaurants with delicious food and stylish hotels – some even throw their own parties. On rare occasions you can even find exciting jungle parties with local and international DJs such as Tehmplo with Solomun or Mayan Warrior. Just remember: the Hotel Zone is the more expensive part of Tulum, so be ready for higher prices.

Nightclubs

Tulum doesn’t have a ton of dance clubs like Miami or LAs Vegas, but you can still dance the night away at its vibrant beach bars and dinner parties. However nightclubs are starting to appear, and the most popular one is Bonbonniere.

Bonbonniere

If you’re looking to dance until dawn, Bonbonniere is your spot! It’s Tulum’s only nightclub that stays open until 5 am, offering a luxurious and high-energy experience with world-class DJs. You’ll find it near other popular places like Bagatelle and Vagalume, making it a perfect afterparty club.

The music at Bonbonniere varies depending on the night. Wednesdays and Thursdays feature local DJs with a more commercial sound. On weekends, expect international talent spinning house and techno.

Bonbonniere has a chic vibe, so dress your best to get in. They have a strict dress code!

Cover / Min Spend - Cover from 1000mx

Beer Price - 155mx

Gin & Tonic - 350mx

Music Genre - Commercial on weekdays, house and techno on weekends.

Reservations and More Information

Tulum Beach Clubs

Tulum'’s beach clubs are the perfect mix of relaxation and fun in the sun! Imagine lounging on white sand, chilling in stylish cabanas, enjoying delicious food, and dancing to cool DJ sets. Some beach clubs also feature Latin music, adding to the diverse musical offerings.

Vagalume Tulum

Vagalume is the spot for non-stop energy, big-name DJs spinning electronic music, and a touch of luxury. Vagalume makes planning easy with a consistent party schedule announced in advance, even bringing in party brands straight from Ibiza like Ten Ibiza and Summerians, featuring local and international DJs to enhance the atmosphere.

Before the party starts, relax beachside or enjoy a delicious meal at their restaurant.  Drinks might be on the pricier side, but entry tickets are surprisingly affordable compared to similar beach clubs.

Cover / Min Spend - There is currently no Min. Spend for sunbeds or dinners (except for special events) and tickets for events start at 550 MXN

Beer Price - 160mx

Gin & Tonic - 350mx

Music Genre - Afro House, House, Techno (Varies depending on event)

Reservations and More Information

Gitano Beach

Experience a taste of Tulum luxury at Gitano Beach. While previously a seasonal pop-up, Gitano Beach now has a permanent location near the beautiful Sian Ka'an nature reserve, along with their new hotel Casa Gitano. Enjoy delicious Modern Mexican and international cuisine with a side of signature mezcal cocktails – all with stunning beach views. On Sundays, things get even more festive with their special Beach BBQ Fiesta. Gitano Beach offers 120 meters of pristine coastline for a truly exclusive experience, and their sunbed minimum spends tend to be lower than other luxury beach clubs.

Cover / Min Spend - Sunbed min consumption from 1500mx, No Cover Fees.

Beer Price - 190mx

Gin & Tonic - 410mx

Music Genre - Disco, 80s, 90s, Afro, House

Reservations and More Information

Taboo

Taboo is a vibrant beach club by the renowned Rosa Negra group, and it plays a significant role in the Tulum nightlife scene. Ideal for travelers seeking a high-energy, upscale beach party. Taboo is also popular for groups celebrating special occasions like birthday or bachelorette parties. You can expect an upscale experience with prices to match. Live violin and saxophone performances blend with commercial house, reggaeton, and Latin pop – music gets more energetic as the day goes on. While the setting is beautiful, be prepared for crowds. Taboo is located on Tulum's main beach, and reservations are highly recommended as they often get fully booked.

Cover / Min Spend - Sunbed 2000mx (50% goes towards consumption)

Beer Price - 95MX

Gin & Tonic - 365MX

Music Genre - Commercial, Reggaton, Latin House

Papaya Playa Project

This sustainable boutique hotel and beach club offers a unique Tulum experience. Enjoy beachfront relaxation, wellness activities, and a variety of music events.  PPP stands out for its focus on fresh, locally sourced cuisine showcasing the flavors of the region.

PPP previously hosted Gratitude season with frequent performances by major artists like Monolink, WhoMadeWho, Ame, Dixon, and more. Currently, their signature "Full Moon Party" takes place every Saturday.

Important Note: Papaya Playa Project is one of the more expensive spots in Tulum.

Cover / Min Spend - Sunbed 2000mx min consumption, Night Parties from 1320mx Cover.

Beer Price - 260mx

Gin & Tonic - 540mx

Music Genre - Deep House and other more chilled categories of house

Reservations and More Information

Dinner Parties

Tulum'’s dinner parties offer a lively alternative to nightclubs. Focused on entertainment, they'’re a chance to experience Tulum'’s unique charm.  Some venues even transform from a coffee shop during the day to a lively dinner party spot at night. Expect a diverse culinary experience – from Greek feasts and elegant French cuisine to fresh local flavors and everything in between! Many venues also feature music, fireshows or live performances, adding to the ambiance.  If you'’re looking for a memorable night, be sure to experience one of Tulum'’s dinner parties.

Ilios

Experience the flavors and energy of Greece at Ilios Greek Estiatorio, a unique dining destination in Tulum. Their menu celebrates traditional Greek cuisine, while live shows – including a dazzling fire show and the festive plate-breaking ceremony – add a touch of Mediterranean excitement.  Ilios is a great choice for a special occasion or when you're craving a lively dinner with fantastic food.

Cover / Min Spend - 2000MXN per person

Beer Price - 80MX

Gin & Tonic - 250MX

Music Genre - Commercial, Entertaining to suit the shows

Gitano Jungle

Step into the bohemian charm of Gitano Jungle, a Tulum favorite for over a decade.  Their menu celebrates fresh, local ingredients prepared with traditional techniques, while their bar boasts an impressive selection of over 50 mezcals and expertly crafted cocktails. As the evening progresses, Gitano Jungle transforms into a lively dance spot. Don't miss their iconic "Gypsy Disco" party every Friday, a whirlwind of 80s and 90s beats that fills the Jungle Room with energy.  Gitano Jungle welcomes a diverse crowd and is proudly LGBTQ-friendly. Reservations are highly recommended to avoid disappointments.

Cover / Min Spend - Cover 1000MX

Beer Price - 190MX

Gin & Tonic - 400MX

Music Genre - 90s, Disco, Indie, Commercial

Reservations and More Information

Rosa Negra

RosaNegra Tulum offers a vibrant dining experience inspired by the culinary traditions of Latin America. Their menu pays tribute to the flavors of Brazil, Peru, Colombia, Mexico, and Argentina, along with a selection of premium Japenese Wagyu beef dishes.  As night falls, the atmosphere transforms with live DJ sets and a, lively percussion shows, and the infectious rhythms of latin music. 

RosaNegra also has a beach club where the Latin party continues throughout the day with music by local DJs and occasionally welcoming international talent.

Cover / Min Spend - No Minimum Spend

Beer Price - 95MX

Gin & Tonic - 365MX

Music Genre - Commercial, Latin House

Bagatelle Tulum

Bagatelle Tulum brings a touch of French Riviera luxury and elegance to the heart of Tulum. Inspired by the flavors and spirit of Southern France, the menu showcases French-Mediterranean cuisine. Bagatelle blends Tulum's relaxed energy with a touch of sophistication, offering lively day parties and dinners set against a beautiful beachfront backdrop. Expect delicious food, a vibrant social scene, and music curated by local DJs.  While they do have a beach club, Bagatelle provides a calmer, more refined experience compared to some of the wilder Tulum beach parties hence we put it into the dinner category.

Cover / Min Spend - 3000 MXN

Beer Price - 145MX

Gin & Tonic - 400MX

Music Genre - Commercial

Reservations and More Information

Tulum Downtown

Tulum Downtown offers a lively and approachable alternative to the Hotel Zone'’s bustling scene, perfectly complementing Tulum's nightlife. Discover friendly rooftop bars, smaller venues with a welcoming vibe, and a focus on spontaneous fun rather than big-name parties.  It'’s a great place to mingle with locals, enjoy live music, and experience the charm of Tulum – all without breaking the bank.

Obsidiana

Get a taste of the Hotel Zone's high-energy nightlife without leaving downtown Tulum!  Obsidiana Rooftop brings urban excitement blended with Tulum's signature charm. Expect vibrant music that keeps the party going late, a tempting food and drink menu, and a crowd of both locals and tourists ready for a great night out. Open daily until 2 am, Obsidiana delivers the Tulum party experience right in the heart of the city.

Cover / Min Spend - No Cover / No Min Spend

Beer Price - 60MX

Gin & Tonic - 200MX

Music Genre - Varies depending on the day

Mayan Monkey

Find the perfect blend of comfort and social energy at Mayan Monkey, strategically located between downtown Tulum and the vibrant Hotel Zone.  While they offer a range of cozy accommodations, it's their rooftop that truly shines. Open to both guests and visitors, the rooftop is where you'll meet fellow travellers, and enjoy drinks with a music spun by a local DJ.  Keep an eye out – they even host appearances by big names like Polo & Pan, Gordo, and Claptone during the high season!

Cover / Min Spend - No Cover / No Min Spend

Beer Price - 70MX

Gin & Tonic - 200MX

Music Genre - Varies depending on DJ.

La Pizzine

Craving delicious pizza and a lively Tulum experience? La Pizzine has you covered! With two locations – La Veleta and Downtown – they offer fantastic food and a buzzing atmosphere that draws in both locals and tourists. For a true party vibe, head to La Pizzine Tria in Downtown Tulum on Mondays. Their legendary Monday nights are a Tulum staple, featuring a DJs playing downtempo, house, and more. Enjoy tasty pizza and an energetic crowd ready to celebrate.

Cover / Min Spend - No Cover / No Min Spend

Beer Price - 50MX

Gin & Tonic - 150MX

Music Genre - Varies depending on event but you can find anything from Downtempo to Rock

Bestiario Tulum

For those nights when you just don't want the party to end, Bestiario is your Downtown Tulum answer. This new spot stays open later than most, often stretching past the usual curfew and bringing a club-like energy to the downtown scene. Located in the bustling area near bars like Obsidiana and La Guarida, you'll find Bestiario showcasing a mix of local and international talent playing more underground sounds like techno, indie dance, and house music.  Entry is typically 150-200 pesos for guys, with ladies often entering for free. Want to save? Message us on WhatsApp to get on the discounted guestlist!

Cover / Min Spend - 150/200 without the Guestlist

Beer Price - 80MX

Gin & Tonic - 150MX

Music Genre - Techno, Indie Dance, House

A place to wind down.

After Tulum's vibrant nightlife, sometimes a change of pace is exactly what you need.  Here are two of our favorite spots to relax and recharge:

Vesica Cenote

Find peace after Tulum's vibrant nightlife at Vesica Tulum.  This members' club offers a serene escape with its beautiful cenote nestled within a jungle 5 minute ride from Centro.  Relax to the sounds of chill background music, enjoy affordable cold beers, and recharge in the natural beauty of the surroundings.  To complete the experience, check out their delicious dishes for a true taste of Tulum.

Cover / Min Spend - 500 MX Cover and 1000 MX Min Consumption

Beer Price - 80MX

Gin & Tonic -

Music Genre - Downtempo, Organic House

Reservations and More Information

FAQs: Tulum Nightlife Edition

What are the best areas for Tulum nightlife?

  • Tulum offers two main hubs of nightlife: the Hotel Zone, with its lively beach clubs and upscale venues, and Downtown Tulum, known for a more relaxed, bohemian atmosphere and budget-friendly options.

Is Tulum nightlife expensive?

  • Tulum can cater to different budgets. The Hotel Zone tends to be pricier, especially at popular beach clubs. Downtown offers more affordable bars and restaurants.  Researching cover charges and drink prices in advance will help you plan accordingly.

Does Tulum have a party scene all year round?

  • Tulum's nightlife is always buzzing, but the high season (December-March) sees the biggest parties, international DJs, and higher prices. If you prefer a slightly calmer scene, the shoulder seasons (April-May, October-November) offer a great balance.

What kind of music can I expect to find in Tulum?

  • Tulum's music scene is incredibly diverse! You'll find everything from electronic beats at the beach clubs  to Latin rhythms downtown, with live music and chilled-out vibes mixed in. Be sure to check out current event calendar for specific genres and artists performing during your trip.

What time do parties end in Tulum?

  • Due to local regulations, most venues have a curfew around 1am or 2am. However, there are still ways to keep the party going with a bit of insider knowledge, message us if you are interested in secret villa or jungle afterparties.

Your feedback is always welcome!  If you have suggestions for venues to include, updates on existing spots, or anything else you'd like to share, please reach out through the contact page.
en.postSummary: Discover Tulum's vibrant nightlife! Your guide to the hottest beach clubs, restaurants, and more. Constantly updated with the latest info.

Find the perfect blend of comfort and social energy at Mayan Monkey, strategically located between downtown Tulum and the vibrant Hotel Zone.  While they offer a range of cozy accommodations, it's their rooftop that truly shines. Open to both guests and visitors, the rooftop is where you'll meet fellow travellers, and enjoy drinks with a music spun by a local DJ.  Keep an eye out – they even host appearances by big names like Polo & Pan, Gordo, and Claptone during the high season!

Cover / Min Spend - No Cover / No Min Spend

Beer Price - 70MX

Gin & Tonic - 200MX

Music Genre - Varies depending on DJ.

La Pizzine

Craving delicious pizza and a lively Tulum experience? La Pizzine has you covered! With two locations – La Veleta and Downtown – they offer fantastic food and a buzzing atmosphere that draws in both locals and tourists. For a true party vibe, head to La Pizzine Tria in Downtown Tulum on Mondays. Their legendary Monday nights are a Tulum staple, featuring a DJs playing downtempo, house, and more. Enjoy tasty pizza and an energetic crowd ready to celebrate.

Cover / Min Spend - No Cover / No Min Spend

Beer Price - 50MX

Gin & Tonic - 150MX

Music Genre - Varies depending on event but you can find anything from Downtempo to Rock

Bestiario Tulum

For those nights when you just don't want the party to end, Bestiario is your Downtown Tulum answer. This new spot stays open later than most, often stretching past the usual curfew and bringing a club-like energy to the downtown scene. Located in the bustling area near bars like Obsidiana and La Guarida, you'll find Bestiario showcasing a mix of local and international talent playing more underground sounds like techno, indie dance, and house music.  Entry is typically 150-200 pesos for guys, with ladies often entering for free. Want to save? Message us on WhatsApp to get on the discounted guestlist!

Cover / Min Spend - 150/200 without the Guestlist

Beer Price - 80MX

Gin & Tonic - 150MX

Music Genre - Techno, Indie Dance, House

A place to wind down.

After Tulum's vibrant nightlife, sometimes a change of pace is exactly what you need.  Here are two of our favorite spots to relax and recharge:

Vesica Cenote

Find peace after Tulum's vibrant nightlife at Vesica Tulum.  This members' club offers a serene escape with its beautiful cenote nestled within a jungle 5 minute ride from Centro.  Relax to the sounds of chill background music, enjoy affordable cold beers, and recharge in the natural beauty of the surroundings.  To complete the experience, check out their delicious dishes for a true taste of Tulum.

Cover / Min Spend - 500 MX Cover and 1000 MX Min Consumption

Beer Price - 80MX

Gin & Tonic -

Music Genre - Downtempo, Organic House

Reservations and More Information

FAQs: Tulum Nightlife Edition

What are the best areas for Tulum nightlife?

  • Tulum offers two main hubs of nightlife: the Hotel Zone, with its lively beach clubs and upscale venues, and Downtown Tulum, known for a more relaxed, bohemian atmosphere and budget-friendly options.

Is Tulum nightlife expensive?

  • Tulum can cater to different budgets. The Hotel Zone tends to be pricier, especially at popular beach clubs. Downtown offers more affordable bars and restaurants.  Researching cover charges and drink prices in advance will help you plan accordingly.

Does Tulum have a party scene all year round?

  • Tulum's nightlife is always buzzing, but the high season (December-March) sees the biggest parties, international DJs, and higher prices. If you prefer a slightly calmer scene, the shoulder seasons (April-May, October-November) offer a great balance.

What kind of music can I expect to find in Tulum?

  • Tulum's music scene is incredibly diverse! You'll find everything from electronic beats at the beach clubs  to Latin rhythms downtown, with live music and chilled-out vibes mixed in. Be sure to check out current event calendar for specific genres and artists performing during your trip.

What time do parties end in Tulum?

  • Due to local regulations, most venues have a curfew around 1am or 2am. However, there are still ways to keep the party going with a bit of insider knowledge, message us if you are interested in secret villa or jungle afterparties.

Your feedback is always welcome!  If you have suggestions for venues to include, updates on existing spots, or anything else you'd like to share, please reach out through the contact page.

en.h1Title: Zamna Beach Events 2025: Tulum's Seaside Party Series
en.metaDescription: Experience the magic of Zamna Beach in Tulum with a stellar lineup of world-renowned artists. From Massano to Monolink, enjoy mesmerizing performances at IT Tulum’s iconic seaside venue. Your guide to the ultimate beachfront party season in Tulum.
en.metaTitle: Zamna Beach Events 2025: Tulum's Seaside Party Series
en.name: Zamna Beach Events 2025
en.postBody:
Zamna is bringing something new to Tulum’s music scene in 2025. Known for its legendary jungle events, Zamna is now adding beachfront parties to its lineup, offering a fresh way to enjoy world-class electronic music by the Caribbean Sea.

These events will take place at a new location that holds a rich history in Tulum nightlife. Once known as Tatich and later Le Emba, this space is being revitalized for iconic IT Restaurant, which is making its grand return to Tulum and partner with Zamna to host Zamna Beach events.

The beachfront setting adds a fresh twist to the festival season, combining the vibrant energy of Zamna with the serene beauty of Tulum’s coast. Perfect for those who want to experience music in a more relaxed yet sophisticated atmosphere, Zamna Beach events promise to be a highlight of the 2025 season.

Zamna Beach: Massano & Chris Avantgarde B2B

Start the Zamna Beach series with an unforgettable night on January 2nd, 2025, featuring an extraordinary lineup of talent. Leading the event is a special Massano b2b Chris Avantgarde set. Known for their innovative take on melodic techno, this pairing promises a performance full of intensity and emotion, blending deep, driving beats with intricate melodies. Joining them is Magit Cacoon, whose signature blend of deep grooves and captivating vocals creates an electrifying atmosphere. Josh Gigante, a rising star known for his dynamic sets, will further elevate the night.

With Zamna Beach’s serene setting and unmatched musical curation, this opening event sets the tone for a spectacular series of performances at IT Tulum.

Lineup: Massano b2b Chris Avantgarde, Magit Cacoon, Josh Gigante, Ermakova

Zamna Beach: Âme Live B2B Trikk

On January 3rd, 2025, Zamna Beach continue its beach series with an unmissable event featuring an extraordinary lineup. Âme Live will team up with Trikk for an exclusive back-to-back performance, delivering their signature blend of deep, melodic, and progressive sounds. Known for their emotionally evocative sets, Âme and Trikk promise to take listeners on a captivating musical journey.

Lineup: Âme Live B2B Trikk, Parallellle, Yet More

Venue: IT Tulum, Carretera Tulum-Boca Paila, KM 6.5, Tulum

Doors: open at 6 PM

Tickets: at zamnafestival.com

Tables: Whatsapp Us

Zamna Beach: Deep Root Tribe

On January 6th, 2025, Zamna Beach continues its stellar series with Deep Root Tribe, presented by Francis Mercier. This event brings a soulful blend of Afro House and deep grooves to the stunning IT Tulum location, creating an unforgettable night of music and cultural connection. Francis Mercier, renowned for his distinctive Afro-infused house music, headlines the night. As the founder of Deep Root Records, his performances are celebrated for their rhythmic energy and global influences. Joining him is MoBlack, a leading figure in Afro House whose tracks have graced dance floors worldwide with their intricate beats and powerful melodies.

Lineup: Francis Mercier, MoBlack, Arymé, Adassiya, Queen Rami

Venue: IT Tulum, Carretera Tulum-Boca Paila, KM 6.5, Tulum

Doors: open at 6 PM

Tickets: at zamnafestival.com

Tables: Whatsapp Us

Zamna Beach: All I Need

On January 7th, 2025, Zamna Beach presents All I Need, a celebration of dynamic beats and electrifying performances. Hosted at IT Tulum, this event brings together a powerhouse lineup of artists for a day of unmatched music and energy. Leading the charge is a special Andrea Oliva vs. Arodes set, blending the Swiss DJ’s mastery of house and techno with Arodes' melodic and emotional touch. South African sensation Shimza, known for his infectious Afro House grooves, adds a pulsating rhythm to the day.

Lineup: Andrea Oliva vs. Arodes, Shimza, Pole Position, Niom vs. Luch

Tickets: at zamnafestival.com

Tables: Whatsapp Us

Zamna Beach: Monolink Live

On January 8th, 2025, Zamna Beach at IT Tulum invites you to an evening of immersive sounds and profound artistry. The night is headlined by Monolink, renowned for his live performances that blend emotive storytelling with melodic electronica. His unique fusion of vocals, live instrumentation, and electronic beats creates an unparalleled live experience. Joining Monolink is Avangart Tabldot, known for pushing boundaries with their avant-garde electronic creations, and The Element, who seamlessly weaves atmospheric beats with compelling grooves.

Lineup: Monolink (Live), Avangart Tabldot, The Element, Alexandthere b2b B'ida

Tickets: at zamnafestival.com

Tables: Whatsapp Us

en.postBody:
Zamna Tables with Tulum Bible

Tulum Bible is thrilled to offer VIP and Backstage table reservations for the most anticipated electronic music events in Tulum, Zamna. If you're looking for an elevated experience at Zamna, securing a table is the way to go. From Afterlife to Keinemusik and ARTBAT, tables provide priority access, premium service, and the best seats in the house for some of the most anticipated music events in Tulum. Our table reservation process is simple and seamless, ensuring you get the best experience at Zamna.

Why Choose a VIP Table at Zamna?

By reserving a table, you unlock access to a world of luxury, ensuring you and your group have a prime spot to enjoy the festival. Here’s what’s included:

  • VIP Entry: No need to purchase separate tickets. Your table reservation includes access to the event and priority check-in.
  • Private Hostess: You’ll be escorted through the festival grounds to your table, with a dedicated VIP host providing personalized service.
  • 100% Consumption Credit: All table prices are credited toward your drinks and bottle service. This means every dollar spent for the table is available for consumption. (Except for Service Fee)
  • Exclusive VIP or Backstage Areas: Depending on the table you choose, enjoy VIP access or backstage privileges, offering a more intimate experience with the event.

How to Reserve a Zamna VIP Table

Reserving your Zamna VIP table is easy, thanks to Tulum Bible's partnership with Zamna Tulum. Follow these simple steps:

  1. Contact Us: Reach out via WhatsApp or email with details about the event you wish to attend, your preferred table type (subject to availability), and the number of people in your group.
  2. Secure Your Table: We’ll send you a custom payment link via stripe generated by Zamna for a 50% deposit, to reserve your table. (Other payment options available)
  3. Final Payment: Complete the remaining payment at the event, along with a 15% service fee.

It’s that simple—reserve your VIP table, show up, and enjoy a seamless and unforgettable experience at Tulum's biggest festivals.

en.h1Title: Zamna and Untold Announce First-Ever Collaboration in Tulum
en.metaDescription: Zamna and Untold have announced a new collaboration in Tulum. Learn what this partnership between two major festival brands could bring to Mexico's music scene.
en.metaTitle: Zamna and Untold Announce First-Ever Collaboration in Tulum
en.name: Zamna and Untold: Two Festival Giants Collide in Tulum
en.postBody:
Zamna and Untold have officially announced their collaboration on Instagram, confirming that exciting new partnerships in the global festival scene is heading to Tulum. While the full lineup and format are yet to be revealed, this announcement has set high expectations for what’s to come. In this blog, we take a closer look at what each brand brings to the table, and what their first-ever collaboration could mean for travelers and music lovers visiting Tulum.

Zamna Festival: Tulum’s Jungle Phenomenon

Zamna Festival has built a strong reputation as one of the most respected boutique electronic music festivals in the world. Set in a natural open-air venue surrounded by jungle, cenotes, and palm trees, it offers a distinct atmposhpere that has become synonymous with Tulum’s winter season. The festival curates shows from leading labels and artists in the house and techno scenes, drawing thousands of international travelers to its multi-week program that runs from late December to mid-January.

Since launching in 2017, Zamna has expanded globally, hosting events in cities like New York, Ibiza, Bali, and Madrid. Yet its flagship events in Tulum remain the heart of the brand, attracting a devoted community that values the music, setting, and atmosphere. The production is known for being tasteful and immersive without relying on flashy gimmicks, and each show feels tailored to the environment, offering a sense of intimacy that large festivals often lack.

Untold Festival: Romania’s Leading Music Event

Untold is Romania’s largest music festival and one of the most attended in Europe. Held in Cluj-Napoca since 2015, it has grown to host hundreds of thousands of attendees each year. Known for its elaborate stage design, large-scale visuals, and broad genre programming, Untold combines EDM, house, techno, live acts, and more across multiple stages.

It has consistently ranked among the top global festivals, earning awards and recognition for its organization and experience. In recent years, Untold has expanded internationally, with a winter festival in the Carpathians called Massif, a beach version called Neversea, and in 2024, a major international debut in Dubai. These moves show Untold’s global ambition and readiness to bring its large-scale production style to new audiences.

What This Collaboration Could Mean

Now that the collaboration is confirmed, what can festival-goers expect from this meeting of two powerhouse brands?

One key element could be the merging of Untold’s high-scale production with Zamna’s curated setting. Untold is known for massive stage builds and visual storytelling, while Zamna has always emphasized its natural venue and focus on sound. If the two approaches blend well, we could see an event that feels both elevated and grounded – something visually ambitious yet still connected to the essence of Tulum.

It’s also possible that Untold will bring a broader musical range than what is usually featured at Zamna. While Zamna leans toward underground house and techno, Untold lineups have included a wide mix of genres. This could create a new type of programming for Tulum’s festival season, attracting fans from different music scenes.

What’s equally exciting is what this partnership means for Tulum’s standing in the global festival world. With Untold’s reach, this event could introduce a larger international audience to Tulum beyond the regular electronic music crowd. It also sets the stage for future collaborations between Latin America and European brands that prioritize both experience and quality.

As of now, no official dates or lineups have been released, but both brands have promised more information soon. For now, festival fans can mark their calendars and prepare for what could be one of the most unique and anticipated events of the 2026 season.

Update: Debut on Galaxy Stage and Presence in Dubai

Since the initial publication of this blog, Zamna has officially announced its debut on Untold’s iconic Galaxy Stage in Romania. In addition, this November, Zamna will host its own dedicated stage at Untold Dubai, marking a significant step in this international collaboration. In their statement, Zamna wrote that “this is just the beginning,” suggesting that more joint projects are in the pipeline.

It’s important to note that an Untold edition in Tulum has not been announced yet. However, these first steps clearly point toward a deepening relationship between the two brands—one that could eventually lead to a collaborative event in Mexico.

Sources:

  • Zamna Festival Instagram announcement
  • Untold Festival official website
  • DJ Mag’s Top 100 Festivals
  • Wikipedia – Untold Festival
  • The National News – Untold Dubai

en.metaTitle: Discover the Best Tulum Yacht Rentals
en.name: Tulum Yacht Rentals, now on Tulum Bible
en.postBody:
Imagine sailing across the stunning turquoise waters of Tulum, with breathtaking coastal views and the luxury of your own private yacht. Renting a yacht in Tulum is the ultimate way to explore the Riviera Maya, offering a perfect blend of relaxation and adventure. Whether you're planning a birthday party, a romantic getaway, or simply want an unforgettable day trip, Our Tulum Yachts partners offer a range of luxury boat options tailored to your desires.

Check our yachts here

Overview of Yacht Rental Options

Tulum is the ideal destination for a memorable private yacht rental. From luxury yachts to catamaran charters, Tulum Yacht Rentals provides the perfect boat for every occasion. Whether you're cruising along Tulum Beach, snorkeling in the Caribbean waters, or sunbathing on the deck, your experience will be enhanced by the beauty of Riviera Maya’s coastline. Options range from catamarans to party boats and luxury yachts, all with professional crews to ensure an unforgettable experience.

Types of Yachts Available

Luxury Yachts

Our selection of luxury yacht rentals includes sleek vessels like the Azimut All-Inclusive Yacht Charter, offering spacious decks, elegant cabins, and personalized itineraries. Ideal for intimate gatherings or a private yacht charter, these yachts feature gourmet meals prepared by private chefs, snorkeling equipment, and paddle boards for aquatic fun.

Catamarans

For those seeking a more stable and spacious option, Catamaran Yacht Rentals Tulum are perfect for groups or families. With wide sun decks and plenty of room for lounging, they provide an excellent private charter experience for sailing, snorkeling, and exploring the coral reefs.

Unique Yacht Packages

At Tulum Bible, we go beyond the average boat rental. We offer a variety of experiences designed to cater to different tastes and occasions, from lively parties to romantic getaways:

Romantic Dinner

Aboard a luxury boat, set sail into the sunset and enjoy a gourmet meal prepared by onboard chef. With the sound of waves and the beauty of Tulum’s white sand beaches in the background, this is the perfect romantic evening.

Coast and Fun

For a lively and fun day on the water, our Boat Rentals offer an exciting mix of relaxation and adventure. Dive into the crystal-clear waters for snorkeling, paddle around on boards, or simply bask in the sun as you cruise along the coast.

DJ Party on the Water

Celebrate in style with a party boat featuring a professional DJ and sound system, transforming your private party into an unforgettable event. Dance, enjoy drinks, and revel in the vibrant energy of the Riviera Maya.

Scuba Diving Adventure

For those seeking underwater exploration, Tulum Yachts offers an exhilarating scuba diving experience. Dive into the vibrant coral reefs and witness a world of colorful marine life just below the surface. All the necessary equipment is provided, and professional dive guides ensure a safe and memorable adventure.

Bachelor or Bachelorette Party

Planning the ultimate celebration? We have a special packages for bachelor or bachelorette parties on the water. With options like a private DJ, top-shelf drinks, and luxury yacht settings, your bachelor party will be one for the books. Cruise along the Riviera Maya with your closest friends, making the most of this once-in-a-lifetime event.

Customizable Add-Ons

To make your private yacht charter even more special, we offer a range of customizable add-ons:

  • Top Shelf Bar (Per Person) - $35.00: Enhance your yacht rental with a selection of premium liquors and cocktails. Perfect for those who want to enjoy their favorite drinks while sailing the Caribbean waters.
  • Champagne Moët Chandon Rosé Impérial - $250.00: Celebrate in style with this luxurious champagne, ideal for a special occasion or simply to enjoy the luxury yacht experience.
  • Birthday Celebration Package (Cake and Decorations) - $280.00: Make your birthday trip extra special with a custom cake and festive decorations, ensuring a memorable day on the water.
  • Photography Package (2 Hours Coverage) - $300.00: Capture every moment of your boat day itinerary with a professional photographer. This package includes 2 hours of coverage, perfect for documenting your adventure along Tulum Beach.
  • Cheese and Charcuterie Board - $35.00: Indulge in a curated selection of cheeses and cured meats, a gourmet snack ideal for enjoying as you relax on your yacht.
  • Professional Photographer (Lifestyle and Underwater Photos) - $1,000.00: Capture both the beauty above and below the water with 60 high-quality lifestyle and underwater photos. A perfect addition for those wanting to preserve their memories with professional photography.
  • Snorkeling Adventure at El Cielo - $120.00: Enhance your trip with a snorkeling adventure in the shallow waters of El Cielo, known for its vibrant marine life.
  • Onboard Models - $50.00: Bring an extra touch of glamour with professional models onboard for high-end photography sessions or to elevate your event.
  • Raw Bar - $100.00: Savor the fresh flavors of the sea with a raw bar selection, perfect for a luxury yacht dining experience.
  • Custom - $?: Have something else in mind? Let us know!

Seamless Booking with Tulum Bible

Booking a private yacht with Tulum Bible is simple and stress-free. Just browse our catalogue or message us on WhatsApp to inquire about boat availability and we’ll assist with everything, from choosing the right boat model to arranging add-ons like a board chef or premium bar upgrades. Whether you’re planning a fun experience with friends, or a romantic getaway, experienced crew is ready to provide a seamless, unforgettable experience.

en.h1Title: Tulum Festivals 2026 Guide – Dates, Lineups & Tickets
en.metaDescription: Discover the top Tulum festivals in 2026. Full lineup details, dates, venues, and ticket info for Zamna and more. Updated for the new season — your complete guide to Tulum festivals 2026.
en.metaTitle: Tulum Festivals 2026 Guide – Dates, Lineups & Tickets
en.name: Tulum Festivals 2026
en.postBody:
Tulum’s festival season has become one of the most anticipated times of the year, drawing electronic music lovers from around the world. Between December and January, venues like Zamna, Tehmplo, and Papaya Playa Project host world-class lineups that bring together international DJs, boutique labels, and immersive productions set against the backdrop of the jungle and Caribbean coast.

This 2026 guide brings you all the confirmed events, dates, and lineups for the upcoming season. Whether you’re planning your New Year’s trip, chasing the biggest names in house and techno, or looking for unique experiences like Day Zero or Afterlife, you’ll find everything you need to know here.

Looking for last year’s lineup? Visit our 2025 archive here.

Day Zero

Day Zero Tulum 2026 takes place on January 10th in the jungle outside Tulum, curated by Damian Lazarus. Expect three stages, sunrise rituals, and a lineup featuring Seth Troxler, Nicola Cruz, Vintage Culture, Acid Pauli, Mau P, and more. Tickets are available on the official site, while tables and backstage packages can be booked directly with us.

Location: Dos Ojos Cenote
Date: January 10th
Tickets:  $270 USD
Read more

Zamna Festival 2026

Zamna is the centerpiece of Tulum’s festival season, running from late December to mid-January in a jungle venue built around natural cenotes. Known for large-scale production, multiple stages, and immersive design, Zamna hosts a series of individual shows rather than a single multi-day festival.

Each night is curated by leading names in electronic music — from global stars like David Guetta and Tiesto to influential brands such as Afterlife, Keinemusik, and Tomorrowland. The result is a sequence of unique events that have made Zamna one of the most unique electronic music destinations worldwide.

Below are the Zamna events announced so far for 2026, listed in order of appearance:

MRAK NYE at Zamna Tulum – December 31st, 2025

MRAK is the solo project of Carmine Conte, known to many as one half of the iconic duo Tale of Us. Under the MRAK alias, he explores soundscapes with even greater intimacy, pushing boundaries between live performance and deep, emotive electronic journeys. His sonic signature includes melodic techno, ambient textures, and emotionally expressive arcs.

Date: December 31, 2025
Venue: Zamna Tulum
Tickets: from $138 USD / $2622 MXN
Red More

‍

David Guetta at Zamna Tulum – January 2, 2026

David Guetta, one of the most influential figures in electronic music, returns to Tulum for a headline show at Zamna Festival. Known for bridging mainstream success with underground credibility, Guetta has been shaping global dance music for over two decades, filling stadiums and topping charts worldwide.

At Zamna, his sound takes on a new dimension: set within the jungle and cenote surroundings, the performance blends large-scale production with the intimate, otherworldly vibe that defines Tulum’s festival season. Expect soaring anthems, immersive visuals, and the kind of high-energy atmosphere that has made Guetta a household name across the globe.

Date: January 2, 2026
Venue: Zamna Tulum
Tickets: from $138 USD / $2622 MXN
Red More

‍

ANTS at Zamna Tulum – January 3, 2026

Born in Ibiza at Ushuaïa in 2013, ANTS has grown into one of the most influential underground party brands in the world, known for its forward-thinking curation of house and techno. Nicknamed The Colony, ANTS has built its reputation on raw energy, industrial-inspired staging, and lineups that balance established icons with rising talent.

On January 3, 2026, ANTS brings its trademark concept to Zamna Tulum, transforming the cenote and jungle venue into a high-energy open-air dancefloor. Previous Tulum editions have showcased the collective’s ability to adapt its Ibiza-born aesthetic into a natural setting, with deep rolling basslines, hypnotic visuals, and a crowd that mirrors the intensity of the music.

Date: January 3, 2026
Venue: Zamna Tulum
Tickets: from $138 USD / $2622 MXN
Read More

Francis Mercier  — January 3, 2026

On the same day but at a different stage Francis Mercier is bringing his Soley series to Zamna Tulum. Born in Port-au-Prince, Haiti, Francis Mercier is more than a DJ/producer—he’s the founder of Deep Root Records and a cultural bridge builder in the global house scene. His sound blends Afro house, melodic house, and emotive deep textures—fusing percussive vitality with lyrical melodicism.

Mercier has called on influences from across the diaspora and nurtured authenticity at the heart of his art. In 2015, he co-founded Deep Root with Ajamu Kambon, aiming to create a musical collective and label that uplifts emerging voices in house and Afro house.

Date: January 3, 2026
Venue: Zamna Tulum
Tickets: from $115 USD / $2185 MXN
Read More

Note: For double events at Zamna (like above) you do not need two tickets, if you buy one you get access to the other

RÜFÜS DU SOL at Zamna – January 4, 2026

Hailing from Sydney, Australia, RÜFÜS DU SOL consists of Tyrone Lindqvist, Jon George, and James Hunt. They broke out with their debut album Atlas (2013), which peaked at #1 in Australia, and followed with Bloom (2016), Solace (2018), Surrender (2021), and most recently Inhale / Exhale (2024). RÜFÜS DU SOL’s sound is often described as atmospheric house, deep house, and alternative dance, characterized by lush synths, emotive vocals, rhythmic drive, and tension / release dynamics. Their recent album Inhale / Exhale (2024) explores themes of emotional duality — love, loss, breath, euphoria — and includes standout tracks such as “Lately,” “Break My Love,” “Pressure,” and “Music Is Better.

Date: January 4, 2026
Venue: Zamna Tulum
Tickets: from $161 USD / $3059 MXN
Read More

‍

NO ART at Zamna – January 5, 2026

ANOTR, the Amsterdam duo behind the NO ART collective, bring their visionary project to Zamna Tulum on January 5, 2026. No Art isn’t just an event—it's a philosophy. Founded in 2017, No Art is an independent label and event curator that stages performances in unexpected spaces. Their mission: not to create parties, but to broaden visitors’ minds—musically and artistically. FAQ

Where is Zamna Tulum?

Zamna Festival events are hosted in Aldea Tulum, about 10 minutes drive from downtown. The main stages are built around cenotes and jungle clearings, offering one of the most unique festival backdrops in the world.  

When is festival season in Tulum?

Festival season typically runs from late December through January. This is when the largest international events and label showcases take place, with Zamna, Tehmplo hosting multiple nights and other venues like Vagalume and Papaya Playa Project adding special programs.  

How much are tickets for Tulum festivals?

Prices vary depending on the event. For 2026, early tickets generally start around $100 USD and can increase to $250+ USD closer to the date. VIP tickets and table packages are also available at much higher price.

What is Day Zero and where does it happen?

Day Zero, founded by Damian Lazarus, is one of Tulum’s most iconic festivals. It takes place in a jungle location at dos ojos cenote outside of Tulum and is inspired by Mayan culture and rituals. The festival runs from sunset to sunrise and is known for its immersive atmosphere.  

How do I get to and from festivals in Tulum?

Taxis can be expensive during festival season (up to $100–150 USD from Zamna to downtown). Many guests book private drivers in advance for reliability and safety. Shuttle services are also available outside Zamna after events.  

Where should I stay for festival season?

Amari Tulum is one of the best options, located between downtown and Zamna, offering stylish villas, wellness amenities, and private transportation to events. Other options include boutique hotels in Aldea Zama or downtown for easy access.

Do festivals in Tulum sell out?  

Yes. Major events like Keinemusik, and Day Zero often sell out  in advance. Tables and backstage experiences are limited and should be reserved early.

Each night is curated by leading names in electronic music — from global stars like David Guetta and Tiesto to influential brands such as Afterlife, Keinemusik, and Tomorrowland. Tickets: from $138 USD / $2622 MXN

Mercier has called on influences from across the diaspora and nurtured authenticity at the heart of his art. In 2015, he co-founded Deep Root with Ajamu Kambon, aiming to create a musical collective and label that uplifts emerging voices in house and Afro house.

Tickets: from $115 USD / $2185 MXN
Read More

RÜFÜS DU SOL’s sound is often described as atmospheric house, deep house, and alternative dance, characterized by lush synths, emotive vocals, rhythmic drive, and tension / release dynamics. Their recent album Inhale / Exhale (2024) explores themes of emotional duality — love, loss, breath, euphoria — and includes standout tracks such as “Lately,” “Break My Love,” “Pressure,” and “Music Is Better.

en.h1Title: Tulum New Year’s Day Events 2025 – Celebrate with Music, Rituals & More
en.metaDescription: Start 2025 in Tulum with unforgettable New Year’s Day events! From Vesica Cenote’s community celebration to Renaissance at Vagalume and PPP’s Gratitude Season, discover the best NYD parties.
en.metaTitle: Tulum New Year’s Day Events 2025 – Celebrate with Music, Rituals & More
en.name: Tulum New Year’s Day Events 2025
en.postBody:
New Year’s Day Events in Tulum 2025

New Year’s Day in Tulum isn’t just a continuation of the celebration—it’s a fresh start, an opportunity to immerse yourself in music, nature, and the vibrant community that makes this beach town so unique. With the stunning backdrop of pristine cenotes, lush jungles, and golden beaches, Tulum’s New Year’s Day (NYD) parties offer an unforgettable way to begin the year. From soulful beats to holistic rituals and community-driven gatherings, here’s your guide to the top NYD events in Tulum for 2025.

Umi New Year’s Day Celebration: First Sunrise of 2025 by Sonestesia

Start your year in the most magical way at Umi Tulum, where the celebration of New Year’s Day begins as the first rays of 2025 light up the horizon. At 5:00 AM, serene yet vibrant gathering that embodies the beauty and spirit of Tulum.

With your feet in the sand and the ocean breeze on your skin, let the music guide you into the day as we celebrate new beginnings together. This enchanting beachfront experience is perfect for those seeking a soulful way to welcome the new year, surrounded by nature and a like-minded community.

🎧 Line-Up (A-Z): Hannibal, MORE TBA

Venue: Umi
Price: Starting 2000 MXN
Time: 5:00 AM, January 1, 2025
Tickets & Tables: Umi New Years Day Party

Why You Should Attend:
There’s no better way to start 2025 than by experiencing Tulum’s famous sunrise on the beach, with uplifting music and a serene atmosphere. Perfect for early risers or those continuing the celebration after NYE.

We Are Tulum: Vesica Cenote x Connected Tulum

Welcome 2025 at Vesica Cenote, where nature meets community for an immersive celebration unlike any other. This event is about more than music—it's a symbolic journey of rebirth and connection. Featuring the crystal-clear waters of Vesica’s cenote, which holds deep spiritual significance in Mayan culture, the gathering blends the essence of Tulum’s vibrant artistic community with the natural beauty of its surroundings.

With over 20 local artists, including AAK, Corcuera, Giorgio Stefano, and Karla Mercedes, this 16-hour event promises a celebration of creativity, unity, and rhythm. Dive into a full day of music, surrounded by the magical heart of Tulum.

🎧 Line-Up (A-Z):
AAK, Corcuera, Gavino, Giorgio Stefano, Irena, Jimeno, Joel Kim, Joserrano, Karla Mercedes, Kevin Ganora, Mada, Off Silence, O S O, RA, Renè, Shoao, Tiago Dima, Vite

  • Venue: Vesica
  • Price: Starting at $1,760 MXN
  • Time: 9am to 1am
  • Tickets & Tables: Tickets Somos Tulum

    • Why You Should Attend:
    This event is a celebration of Tulum’s authentic essence. Set amidst the enchanting waters of Vesica Cenote, it’s a chance to connect with the local community and experience Tulum’s unique vibe. With a lineup showcasing homegrown talent, this event is perfect for those seeking a more intimate and spiritual start to 2025.

    PPP Gratitude Season 2025: The Rise Era - Día Uno

    Papaya Playa Project kicks off the year with a special edition of Gratitude Season: Día Uno, an event dedicated to renewal, harmony, and consciousness activation. Honoring the cycles of life and the cultural significance of new beginnings, this holistic celebration integrates meaningful rituals, cultural experiences, and artistic expressions.

    Día Uno is more than a party; it’s a journey of self-reflection, gratitude, and connection. Attendees will participate in rituals and activities designed to align with the natural rhythms of life, creating a deeply spiritual way to start the year in harmony with nature.

  • Venue: Papaya Playa Project
  • Price: Starting at $5,500 MXN
  • Time: 12pm to 7pm
  • Tickets: Tickets Dia Uno

    • Why You Should Attend:
    For those seeking more than music, this event offers a profound opportunity to ground yourself through rituals and holistic experiences. It’s a tranquil, family-friendly way to celebrate the transition into the new year while staying connected to Tulum’s cultural roots.

    Renaissance x Sinner at Vagalume: Featuring Sasha

    Renaissance, one of the world’s most prestigious dance music brands, makes its Tulum debut in collaboration with SINNER at Vagalume for an unforgettable New Year’s Day celebration. Known for its legendary events and iconic artists, Renaissance brings a carefully curated lineup headlined by Sasha, a globally celebrated DJ and Renaissance’s original resident.

    This unique beachfront event blends world-class music with the vibrant energy of Tulum’s party scene. The lineup also features local and international talent, including Mehill, Vite, Miganova & Gabriel I, alongside current Renaissance resident Marcus James, delivering a day filled with deep, melodic beats.

    🎧 Line-Up (A-Z):
    Sasha, Mehill, Vite, Miganova & Gabriel I, Marcus James

  • Venue: Vagalume
  • Price: Starting at $880 MXN
  • Time: 5pm to 1am
  • Tickets & Tables: Renaissance x Sinner

    • Why You Should Attend:
    Set against the breathtaking backdrop of Vagalume’s beach club, this event combines the prestige of Renaissance with the vibrancy of Tulum’s party scene. With Sasha leading the charge, it’s an extraordinary chance to experience a globally renowned brand in an intimate beachside setting.

    Amémé at Bonbonniere

    Tulum’s luxurious nightclub, Bonbonniere, will host Amémé on January 1st. Known for his Afro house rhythms and deep, soulful sound, Amémé has become a global icon in the electronic music scene. This intimate setting offers the perfect opportunity to groove into the new year in style. Bonbonniere’s upscale ambiance and vibrant atmosphere make this event one of NYD’s most exclusive celebrations.

  • Venue: Bonbonniere
  • Price: Starting at $1000 MXN
  • Time: 11pm to 5am
  • Tickets & Tables: Ameme at Bonbonniere

    • Why You Should Attend:
    ‍    Bonbonniere’s luxurious ambiance, retractable roof, and state-of-the-art production provide the perfect vanue for Amémé’s captivating sound. Whether you're a devoted fan of Afro house or seeking an elevated nightlife experience, this event promises a night of unmatched energy and style.

    NYD Events and Parties 2025

    Whether you’re looking for an immersive community gathering, a holistic day of renewal, or world-class music, Tulum’s New Year’s Day events have something for everyone. As the sun rises over this magical town, the celebrations continue, offering an unparalleled way to start 2025.

    With limited spots and tickets selling fast, don’t wait too long to secure your place at one of these incredible events. From the heart of the jungle to the crystal-clear cenotes and vibrant beaches, Tulum’s New Year’s Day parties are the perfect way to embrace new beginnings.

    Let’s make this New Year’s Day one to remember. See you in Tulum!
