With the stunning backdrop of pristine cenotes, lush jungles, and golden beaches, Tulum’s New Year’s Day (NYD) parties offer an unforgettable way to begin the year. From soulful beats to holistic rituals and community-driven gatherings, here’s your guide to the top NYD events in Tulum for 2025.

Umi New Year’s Day Celebration: First Sunrise of 2025 by Sonestesia

Start your year in the most magical way at Umi Tulum, where the celebration of New Year’s Day begins as the first rays of 2025 light up the horizon. At 5:00 AM, serene yet vibrant gathering that embodies the beauty and spirit of Tulum.

With your feet in the sand and the ocean breeze on your skin, let the music guide you into the day as we celebrate new beginnings together. This enchanting beachfront experience is perfect for those seeking a soulful way to welcome the new year, surrounded by nature and a like-minded community.

🎧 Line-Up (A-Z): Hannibal, MORE TBA

Venue: Umi
Price: Starting 2000 MXN
Time: 5:00 AM, January 1, 2025
Tickets & Tables: Umi New Years Day Party

Why You Should Attend:
There’s no better way to start 2025 than by experiencing Tulum’s famous sunrise on the beach, with uplifting music and a serene atmosphere. Perfect for early risers or those continuing the celebration after NYE.

We Are Tulum: Vesica Cenote x Connected Tulum

Welcome 2025 at Vesica Cenote, where nature meets community for an immersive celebration unlike any other. This event is about more than music—it's a symbolic journey of rebirth and connection. Featuring the crystal-clear waters of Vesica’s cenote, which holds deep spiritual significance in Mayan culture, the gathering blends the essence of Tulum’s vibrant artistic community with the natural beauty of its surroundings.

With over 20 local artists, including AAK, Corcuera, Giorgio Stefano, and Karla Mercedes, this 16-hour event promises a celebration of creativity, unity, and rhythm. Dive into a full day of music, surrounded by the magical heart of Tulum.

🎧 Line-Up (A-Z):
AAK, Corcuera, Gavino, Giorgio Stefano, Irena, Jimeno, Joel Kim, Joserrano, Karla Mercedes, Kevin Ganora, Mada, Off Silence, O S O, RA, Renè, Shoao, Tiago Dima, Vite

  • Venue: Vesica
  • Price: Starting at $1,760 MXN
  • Time: 9am to 1am
  • Tickets & Tables: Tickets Somos Tulum

    • Why You Should Attend:
    This event is a celebration of Tulum’s authentic essence. Set amidst the enchanting waters of Vesica Cenote, it’s a chance to connect with the local community and experience Tulum’s unique vibe. With a lineup showcasing homegrown talent, this event is perfect for those seeking a more intimate and spiritual start to 2025.

    PPP Gratitude Season 2025: The Rise Era - Día Uno

    Papaya Playa Project kicks off the year with a special edition of Gratitude Season: Día Uno, an event dedicated to renewal, harmony, and consciousness activation. Honoring the cycles of life and the cultural significance of new beginnings, this holistic celebration integrates meaningful rituals, cultural experiences, and artistic expressions.

    Día Uno is more than a party; it’s a journey of self-reflection, gratitude, and connection. Attendees will participate in rituals and activities designed to align with the natural rhythms of life, creating a deeply spiritual way to start the year in harmony with nature.

  • Venue: Papaya Playa Project
  • Price: Starting at $5,500 MXN
  • Time: 12pm to 7pm
  • Tickets: Tickets Dia Uno

    • Why You Should Attend:
    For those seeking more than music, this event offers a profound opportunity to ground yourself through rituals and holistic experiences. It’s a tranquil, family-friendly way to celebrate the transition into the new year while staying connected to Tulum’s cultural roots.

    Renaissance x Sinner at Vagalume: Featuring Sasha

    Renaissance, one of the world’s most prestigious dance music brands, makes its Tulum debut in collaboration with SINNER at Vagalume for an unforgettable New Year’s Day celebration. Known for its legendary events and iconic artists, Renaissance brings a carefully curated lineup headlined by Sasha, a globally celebrated DJ and Renaissance’s original resident.

    This unique beachfront event blends world-class music with the vibrant energy of Tulum’s party scene. The lineup also features local and international talent, including Mehill, Vite, Miganova & Gabriel I, alongside current Renaissance resident Marcus James, delivering a day filled with deep, melodic beats.

    🎧 Line-Up (A-Z):
    Sasha, Mehill, Vite, Miganova & Gabriel I, Marcus James

  • Venue: Vagalume
  • Price: Starting at $880 MXN
  • Time: 5pm to 1am
  • Tickets & Tables: Renaissance x Sinner

    • Why You Should Attend:
    Set against the breathtaking backdrop of Vagalume’s beach club, this event combines the prestige of Renaissance with the vibrancy of Tulum’s party scene. With Sasha leading the charge, it’s an extraordinary chance to experience a globally renowned brand in an intimate beachside setting.

    Amémé at Bonbonniere

    Tulum’s luxurious nightclub, Bonbonniere, will host Amémé on January 1st. Known for his Afro house rhythms and deep, soulful sound, Amémé has become a global icon in the electronic music scene. This intimate setting offers the perfect opportunity to groove into the new year in style. Bonbonniere’s upscale ambiance and vibrant atmosphere make this event one of NYD’s most exclusive celebrations.

  • Venue: Bonbonniere
  • Price: Starting at $1000 MXN
  • Time: 11pm to 5am
  • Tickets & Tables: Ameme at Bonbonniere

    • Why You Should Attend:
    ‍    Bonbonniere’s luxurious ambiance, retractable roof, and state-of-the-art production provide the perfect vanue for Amémé’s captivating sound. Whether you're a devoted fan of Afro house or seeking an elevated nightlife experience, this event promises a night of unmatched energy and style.

    NYD Events and Parties 2025

    Whether you’re looking for an immersive community gathering, a holistic day of renewal, or world-class music, Tulum’s New Year’s Day events have something for everyone. As the sun rises over this magical town, the celebrations continue, offering an unparalleled way to start 2025.

    With limited spots and tickets selling fast, don’t wait too long to secure your place at one of these incredible events. From the heart of the jungle to the crystal-clear cenotes and vibrant beaches, Tulum’s New Year’s Day parties are the perfect way to embrace new beginnings.

    Let’s make this New Year’s Day one to remember. See you in Tulum!
es.postSummary: Start 2025 in Tulum with unforgettable New Year’s Day events! From Vesica Cenote’s community celebration to Renaissance at Vagalume and PPP’s Gratitude Season, discover the best NYD parties.

en.h1Title: Getting Around Tulum: A Guide for Travelers
en.metaDescription: Get around Tulum like a pro! This guide covers taxis, colectivos, ADO buses, car rentals, bikes, and more. Includes prices and contact info.
en.metaTitle: Getting Around Tulum: A Guide for Travelers
en.name: Tulum Local Transportation Guide
en.postBody:
Tulum offers a variety of transportation options to suit your needs and budget. Whether you're staying in Tulum Centro, the hotel zone, or exploring the surrounding areas, here's a guide to getting around:

Taxis

Taxis are readily available throughout Tulum and a convenient way to get around, especially at night or with luggage. Since taxis do not use meters, agree on a fare upfront before getting in. You can find taxi stands in most tourist areas or hail one on the street.

Here are some taxi fares for popular destinations, remember to always ask about the price before getting in the taxi.

  • Tulum to Cancun Airport - around 2,000 MXN
  • Tulum to Tulum Airport - around 900 MXN
  • Tulum to Ruins - around 150 MXN
  • Tulum to Hotel Zone - around 300 MXN

Some of the Local Taxi numbers.

  • +52 984 141 5095
  • +52 984 318 3556
  • +52 984 278 5636

Colectivos

Colectivos are shared vans that are a popular and affordable way to travel between Tulum and other towns and cities in the Yucatan Peninsula. They are not as comfortable as taxis but are a great option for budget-minded travelers. Colectivos generally depart from designated stations, although they also pick up and drop off passengers along the way. Here are some common routes and their fares:

  • Tulum to Muyil: 40 MXN
  • Tulum to Akumal: 50 MXN
  • Tulum to Puerto Aventuras: 60 MXN
  • Tulum to Playa del Carmen: 70 MXN
  • Tulum to Coba: 80 MXN

ADO Buses

ADO buses are a safe and reliable way to travel longer distances. There is a main ADO bus station located in Tulum Centro. Official ADO website is https://www.ado.com.mx/ but it can often be buggy and alternative would be BusBud however there is an additional fee when purchasing tickets through them.

  • Tulum to Cancun: 242 MXN
  • Tulum to Cancun Airport: 420 MXN
  • Tulum to Chichen itza: 340 MXN
  • Tulum to Playa Del Carmen: 120 MXN
  • Tulum to Chiquilá (Holbox): 494 MXN
  • Tulum to Bacalar: 396 MXN
  • Tulum to Merida: 520 MXN

Renting a Car

Renting a car gives you the most flexibility to explore Tulum and the surrounding areas at your own pace. Several car rental companies are located in Tulum, both at the airport and in town.

Here are some contact numbers:

  • Caribbean Rentas:  +52 984 152 6965 (Local Rental company with lower deposits)
  • Avis: +52 800 770 2847
  • Europcar: +52 998 980 0664

Bicycles and Scooters

Biking and scootering are a great way to get around Tulum if you're staying close to the beach and town center.  Several shops rent bicycles and scooters by the day or week.

  • Tulum Scooters: +52 984 207 0300

We hope this guide helps you get around Tulum and explore all that this beautiful destination has to offer!
en.postSummary: Get around Tulum like a pro! This guide covers taxis, colectivos, ADO buses, car rentals, bikes, and more. Includes prices and contact info.

en.metaDescription: Discover the best New Year’s Eve 2025 celebrations in Tulum, from luxurious dinners to all-night jungle parties. Explore events at Zamna, Gitano, Papaya Playa Project, and more. Book your tickets or tables now for an unforgettable NYE experience in Tulum!
en.name: Best Tulum NYE 2025 Parties & Events
en.postBody:
Celebrate Tulum New Year’s Eve 2025 Your Way

Tulum New Year’s Eve 2025 is shaping up to be one of the most exciting nights of the year, with a mix of exclusive dinners, vibrant parties, and unforgettable experiences. As one of the top destinations for NYE, Tulum offers something for everyone, from beachside celebrations to jungle events featuring world-class DJs and curated menus.

This year, many events have already been announced, and tickets are selling quickly. Whether you’re heading to ARTBAT Upperground at Zamna Tulum, dancing at Mayan Warrior at Tehmplo, or enjoying a party and dinner at venues like Vagalume and Papaya Playa Project, there’s an event to match every vibe. For those who love intimate settings, Set Underground at Vesica Cenote offers a magical combination of music and nature.

If you’re planning to celebrate New Year’s Eve in Tulum, now is the time to secure your tickets, tables, or dinner reservations. The most popular events are filling up fast, so don’t miss the chance to start 2025 in the best way possible.

All-Night Jungle Parties

Mayan Warrior NYE 2025 at Tehmplo

Mayan Warrior returns to Tulum for an unforgettable New Year’s Eve at Tehmplo. Known for its iconic art cars and immersive visual and soundscapes, Mayan Warrior will debut its Galaxy Art Car in Tulum, fresh from Burning Man. This renowned event merges cutting-edge music with breathtaking art installations, all set in an extraordinary jungle venue.

Why You Should Attend

Mayan Warrior offers the ultimate fusion of art, music, and nature, providing an unforgettable jungle party experience. Its location near Tulum’s Hotel Zone makes it both accessible and magical.

Key Details

  • Venue: Tehmplo
  • Tickets: Starting at $102 USD
  • Time: 10 PM until sunrise
  • Tickets: Mayan Warrior tickets
  • Tables: Whatsapp

Set Underground NYE 2025 at Vesica Cenote (Selling Fast)

Set Underground’s “Midnight Sparkle Mirage” invites you to a dazzling celebration at Vesica Cenote, just minutes from Tulum Centro. This Burning Man-inspired party features shimmering LED installations, projection mapping, and live sets by Bora Uzer (5-hour set), Christian Löffler, and Parra for Cuva.

Why You Should Attend

For those seeking a unique cenote and jungle experience away from typical beach parties, Set Underground offers an intimate, artistic celebration with cutting-edge music and immersive visuals.

Key Details

  • Venue: Vesica Cenote
  • Tickets: Starting at 1,100 MXN
  • Time: 8 PM until sunrise
  • Tickets & Tables: Set Underground Reservation

ARTBAT Upperground at Zamna Tulum NYE 2025

ARTBAT returns to Zamna Tulum to ring in 2025 with their globally acclaimed Upperground showcase. The Ukrainian duo, known for their deep house and melodic techno soundscapes, will headline what is expected to be the largest event of the season. Taking place amidst th jungle surroundings of Zamna Cenote, this party promises a festival-like atmosphere with world-class production, immersive visuals, and an unforgettable lineup.

Why You Should Attend

If you’re looking for the biggest and most high-energy New Year’s Eve event in Tulum, ARTBAT’s Upperground is the ultimate choice. With thousands of attendees expected and top-tier sound systems, this event delivers the true festival experience.

Key Details

  • Venue: Zamna Cenote
  • Tickets: Starting at $100 USD
  • Time: Doors open at 10 PM until sunrise
  • Tickets: zamnafestival.com
  • Tables: Whatsapp

NYE Parties with Dinner

Vagalume NYE 2025 (Selling Fast)

Vagalume Tulum, one of the most iconic venues in Tulum’s Hotel Zone. This year, Vagalume brings you an unforgettable evening featuring an extended B2B set by Sébastien Léger and Roy Rosenfeld, promising deep, soulful beats that will keep you moving all night. Alongside this world-class music lineup, indulge in a gourmet dinner experience, prepared by top chefs Adriana Resinas Hernández and Marco Estrada, offering a blend of bold, flavorful dishes.

Whether you choose to enjoy dinner, general admission, or table service, this event combines exceptional music, food, and ambiance, making it one of the top NYE destinations in Tulum.

Why You Should Attend

Vagalume’s perfect beachfront location, vibrant atmosphere, and carefully curated lineup make it an unmissable NYE celebration. With options for both dining and dancing, it’s the ideal spot to enjoy a seamless blend of luxury, music, and celebration.

Key Details

  • Venue: Vagalume
  • Tickets: Starting from $110 USD
  • Open Bar: Dinner tickets include open bar from 7PM to 10PM
  • Time: Dinner seating at 7 PM, GA starting 9PM
  • Tickets & Tables : Vagalume NYE

UMi – A Taste of PARACAS

UMi’s New Year’s Eve celebration offers a unique blend of Peruvian-inspired cuisine and vibrant festivities. This event marks the introduction of PARACAS, UMi’s upcoming concept celebrating Peru’s rich culinary heritage. Begin the evening with a sound healing session at 6 PM, followed by a six-course dinner featuring dishes like Ponja Ceviche, Lomo Saltado, and Dark Chocolate Tart, paired with sparkling wine and 12 grapes for the traditional New Year’s toast. After dinner, enjoy live music transitioning into an energizing DJ set, with access to an after-party starting at 5:30 AM.

Why You Should Attend:
UMi combines a sophisticated dining experience with Tulum’s lively spirit, making it the perfect spot to welcome 2025. The fusion of culture, flavors, sound healing and music creates a celebration that’s as unique as the first sunrise of the year.

Key Details

  • Venue: Umi
  • Tickets: Starting from $200 USD + 15% Service Fee (Prices includes access to the afterparty starting 5am)
  • Time:  Sound Healing starting 6PM, Dinner seating at 7 PM.
  • ‍Tickets & Tables : Umi NYE

Papaya Playa Project NYE 2025 (Selling Fast)

Step into an evening of introspection, appreciation, and renewal at Papaya Playa Project's New Year’s Eve 2025 celebration. Honoring ancestral traditions and cleansing energies, this unforgettable night invites you to prepare your soul for a new cycle while enjoying the perfect blend of music, culinary artistry, and meaningful connections. The music journey, curated by Damian Lazarus, Goldcap, and Honeyluv, sets the tone for an unforgettable NYE celebration, ensuring you welcome 2025 with renewed energy and inspiration. Relish a multi-course dinner on the beach, meticulously curated by a guest chef, followed by a climactic countdown ceremony to bid farewell to 2024 and embrace the new year.

Why You Should Attend

This event seamlessly combines Tulum’s natural beauty with gourmet dining and top-tier music. Whether dining or dancing, it’s the perfect way to welcome 2025.

Key Details

  • Venue: Papaya Playa Project
  • Tickets: Starting from $5610 MXN
  • Time: NYE Ceremony 7 PM, GA 9 PM, Last Entry 1 AM
  • Tickets: PPP NYE
  • ‍Tables: Whatsapp

Gitano Jungle NYE 2025

Gitano Jungle is hosting its iconic Gypsy Disco Dinner & Dancing celebration for New Year’s Eve. Set in the jungle venue, the event features a curated four-course Modern Mexican menu, paired with champagne and mezcal cocktails. Guests can enjoy performances by international Afro House DJ 4RAIN, resident DJ THE VERSA, and a live Gitano Jungle Cabaret show.

Why You Should Attend

Gitano Jungle perfectly combines elegance, celebration, and Tulum’s bohemian vibe. With world-class dining and unforgettable entertainment, this event offers a glamorous way to start 2025. Whether you’re a returning fan of the Gypsy Disco or a first-time attendee, this is a night you won’t want to miss.

Key Details

  • Venue: Gitano Jungle
  • Tickets: Starting at $5,000 MXN
  • Time: Starting at 8 PM
  • Tickets: Gitano Jungle NYE
  • Tables: Whatsapp

Gitano Beach NYE 2025

Gitano Beach Tulum, set against the backdrop of Tulum’s pristine shoreline near the Sian Ka’an nature reserve. Enjoy a carefully curated four-course dinner menu, paired with craft cocktails and champagne, followed by live entertainment and DJs sets to keep the energy alive as you welcome 2025 in style.

Why You Should Attend

Gitano Beach is perfect for those seeking a chic beachside celebration. With its delicious Modern Mexican cuisine, impeccable service, and stunning ocean views, this event offers an elevated yet fun atmosphere to mark the start of the new year. Whether you come for the dinner or the party, Gitano Beach promises a memorable NYE experience.

Key Details

  • Venue: Gitano Beach
  • Tickets: Dinner packages starting at $4,000 MXN
  • Time: Starting 6 PM
  • Tickets & Bottles Service: Gitano Beach NYE

Ahau’s Legendary NYE Celebration

Celebrate New Year’s Eve in style at Ahau Tulum, one of the Riviera Maya’s most iconic beachfront destinations. Returning for its 14th edition, this event combines a gourmet dinner curated by Chef Arturo Eslava with vibrant music and an open bar, creating an immersive experience for all attendees. Dance under the stars and soak in the enchanting atmosphere with friends as Ahau delivers an unforgettable night.

Why You Should Attend
Ahau’s NYE celebration is the perfect blend of exquisite dining, world-class music, and beachfront charm. Featuring performances by Savage & SHē, Dean Walker, Kid Bamboo, K8, and Mee · Kay, this event offers something for everyone in an elegant, yet energetic setting.

Key Details

  • Venue: Ahau
  • Tickets: Starting at $5,060 MXN
  • Time: Starting 8 PM
  • Tickets & Bottles Service: Ahau NYE

Exclusive Dinner Experiences

Bagatelle Tulum NYE 2025

Celebrate NYE in style at Bagatelle Tulum with a gourmet dinner. Known for its French Riviera-inspired atmosphere, this event offers a carefully curated 5-course menu featuring dishes like lobster tartar and Wagyu tenderloin, complemented by live music and entertainment.

Why You Should Attend

Bagatelle is globally renowned, with locations in Saint-Tropez, London, and Miami. This NYE, indulge in world-class dining and lively celebrations in one of Tulum’s most exclusive venues.

Key Details

  • Venue: Bagatelle Tulum
  • Tickets: Starting at $10,000 MXN per person
  • Time: Dinner from 8 PM
  • Dinner: Bagatelle NYE

Mia Tulum NYE Dinner 2025

Mía invites you to a special evening featuring a five-course gourmet dinner, paired with premium wines and champagne to toast the night away. As the evening progresses, the vibe shifts with live DJs and entertainment, making it a night of seamless transitions from fine dining to vibrant dancing by the beach.

Set in one of Tulum’s most stunning locations, Mía Beach Club promises an evening of refined elegance and lively celebration, offering a perfect blend of sophistication and fun.

Why You Should Attend:

Mía Beach Club is the ideal choice for those seeking a beachfront setting to welcome the new year. With its exquisite five-course menu, premium drinks, and energetic entertainment, this event caters to both fine-dining enthusiasts and party lovers.

First Dinner Seating

  • Time: 6:00 PM to 8:30 PM
  • Price: $98 per person (+15% service charge)
  • Inclusions: A delightful four-course dinner designed to please all palates.
  • Optional Upgrade: Add access to the party with a welcome drink for an additional $100 USD.
  • Note: This seating is family-friendly, and children are welcome.

Second Dinner Seating

  • Time: 9:00 PM onwards
  • Price: $275 per person (+15% service charge)
  • Inclusions: A sumptuous five-course dinner, entrance to the NYE party, and a welcome drink.
  • Note: This seating is exclusively for adults, creating a sophisticated atmosphere to ring in the New Year.

Tickets and Dinner at Mia NYE

Mia Tulum NYE Party 2025

Celebrate the arrival of 2025 at Mía Tulum, hosting its much-anticipated New Year’s Eve Party. This beachfront celebration combines the magic of live performances, vibrant rhythms, and an unmatched Tulum vibe for a night to remember.

Dance under the stars to performances by:

  • Lauren Mia, delivering her signature melodic and emotive soundscapes.
  • Ôona Dahl, known for her ethereal and experimental electronic beats.
  • Calypsis, bringing dynamic energy to keep the party alive.

Tickets for Mia NYE Party

Ilios Tulum NYE Dinner 2025

Transport yourself to Greece with Ilios’ New Year’s Eve celebration, featuring authentic Mediterranean cuisine and live entertainment, including fire shows and plate-breaking traditions. A night full of flavor, culture, and joy.

Why You Should Attend

Ilios combines world-class dining with unique cultural traditions, offering an unforgettable NYE experience in Tulum.

Key Details

  • Venue: Ilios Tulum
  • Price: Starting at 5500 MXN per person
  • Time: Dinner begins at 7 PM
  • Dinner: Ilios Dinner NYE

Others NYE Celebrations

Set Sail into 2025 with Highly Catered!

Celebrate New Year’s Eve in style aboard our luxury yacht party! Enjoy delicious food, premium drinks, a live DJ, and stunning sunset views as we sail into the New Year.
Key Details

  • Venue: Private Yacht
  • Location: Puerto Aventuras (Tulum transportation included)
  • Tickets: Starting at $300 USD
  • Time: 2:00 PM – 6:00 PM
  • Tickets: High Tyde by Highly Catered

Bonbonniere Tulum NYE 2025

Bonbonniere Tulum invites you to an upscale, high-energy New Year’s Eve celebration in the heart of the Hotel Zone. Known for its opulent interiors and vibrant after-hours atmosphere, this nightclub is the go-to spot for luxury and exclusivity. While the lineup hasn’t been announced, expect top-tier DJs and a glamorous crowd ready to welcome 2025 in style.

Why You Should Attend

If you’re seeking an elite nightlife experience with world-class music and chic vibes, Bonbonniere is the place to be. Its late-night hours (open until 5 AM) make it the perfect destination for those who want to keep the party going long after the countdown.

Key Details

  • Venue: Bonbonniere Tulum
  • Tickets: Starting at $1,000 MXN
  • Time: Doors open at 10 PM
  • Tickets & Tables: Bonbonniere NYE

NYE Celebrations at Amansala Chica

Music Under The Stars NYE Celebration at Amansala Chica in Tulum with J.POOL and Special Guests Pascale Caristo, Shane Carling, Xa.Monika .Join your Soul Family for an Evening of Community, Connection, Expression, and Incredible Music All Night!

WEAR WHITE ATTIRE (not mandatory but suggested)

Enter the New Year in an Intentional and Conscious way surrounded with your Soul Tribe and Family at this booze free event!

Key Details

  • Venue: Amansala Chica
  • Tickets: Starting at $97 USD
  • Time: Doors open at 8 PM
  • Tickets: Nye at Amansala

Rosa Negra Group NYE Celebrations 2025

The Rosa Negra Group is renowned for delivering unforgettable New Year’s Eve celebrations across its high-end venues. Whether you’re looking for an elegant dinner or a lively atmosphere filled with music and entertainment, each venue offers something unique. Known for their exceptional cuisine and vibrant ambiance, Rosa Negra’s venues are some of the most sought-after spots for ringing in the new year.

Venues to Choose From:

  • Rosa Negra Tulum – A vibrant celebration featuring Latin American flavors and energetic percussion shows.
  • Tora Tulum – Elegant Japanese-inspired dining with Wagyu beef specialties and curated cocktails.
  • Taboo Tulum – Mediterranean cuisine paired with live entertainment, ideal for a glamorous NYE evening.
  • Parole Tulum – Italian fine dining with live music and an enchanting ambiance.
  • Funky Geisha Tulum – A playful fusion of Asian flavors and a dynamic party atmosphere.
  • Tantra Tulum – A luxurious Indian-inspired venue offering a vibrant mix of exotic flavors and captivating entertainment.

Why You Should Attend

Rosa Negra Group’s venues offer a blend of exceptional dining and vibrant entertainment, perfect for groups, couples, or anyone looking to celebrate in style. With each venue delivering a unique experience, there’s an option for every taste—whether you prefer Mediterranean, Japanese, Latin, or Asian-inspired cuisine.

Key Details

  • Prices: 6000 MXN per person
  • How to Book: Send us a message on WhatsApp to reserve your spot at any of these incredible venues.

Wrapping Up Tulum NYE 2025

Tulum New Year’s Eve 2025 is shaping up to be an unforgettable celebration, with events ranging from jungle parties to luxurious dinners and vibrant beach club celebrations. es.postBody:
Celebrate Tulum New Year’s Eve 2025 Your Way

Tulum New Year’s Eve 2025 is shaping up to be one of the most exciting nights of the year, with a mix of exclusive dinners, vibrant parties, and unforgettable experiences. As one of the top destinations for NYE, Tulum offers something for everyone, from beachside celebrations to jungle events featuring world-class DJs and curated menus.

This year, many events have already been announced, and tickets are selling quickly. Whether you’re heading to ARTBAT Upperground at Zamna Tulum, dancing at Mayan Warrior at Tehmplo, or enjoying a party and dinner at venues like Vagalume and Papaya Playa Project, there’s an event to match every vibe. For those who love intimate settings, Set Underground at Vesica Cenote offers a magical combination of music and nature.

If you’re planning to celebrate New Year’s Eve in Tulum, now is the time to secure your tickets, tables, or dinner reservations. The most popular events are filling up fast, so don’t miss the chance to start 2025 in the best way possible.

All-Night Jungle Parties

Mayan Warrior NYE 2025 at Tehmplo

Mayan Warrior returns to Tulum for an unforgettable New Year’s Eve at Tehmplo. Known for its iconic art cars and immersive visual and soundscapes, Mayan Warrior will debut its Galaxy Art Car in Tulum, fresh from Burning Man. This renowned event merges cutting-edge music with breathtaking art installations, all set in an extraordinary jungle venue.

Why You Should Attend

Mayan Warrior offers the ultimate fusion of art, music, and nature, providing an unforgettable jungle party experience. Its location near Tulum’s Hotel Zone makes it both accessible and magical.

Key Details

  • Venue: Tehmplo
  • Tickets: Starting at $102 USD
  • Time: 10 PM until sunrise
  • Tickets: Mayan Warrior tickets
  • Tables: Whatsapp

Set Underground NYE 2025 at Vesica Cenote (Selling Fast)

Set Underground’s “Midnight Sparkle Mirage” invites you to a dazzling celebration at Vesica Cenote, just minutes from Tulum Centro. This Burning Man-inspired party features shimmering LED installations, projection mapping, and live sets by Bora Uzer (5-hour set), Christian Löffler, and Parra for Cuva.

Why You Should Attend

For those seeking a unique cenote and jungle experience away from typical beach parties, Set Underground offers an intimate, artistic celebration with cutting-edge music and immersive visuals.

Key Details

  • Venue: Vesica Cenote
  • Tickets: Starting at 1,100 MXN
  • Time: 8 PM until sunrise
  • Tickets & Tables: Set Underground Reservation

ARTBAT Upperground at Zamna Tulum NYE 2025

ARTBAT returns to Zamna Tulum to ring in 2025 with their globally acclaimed Upperground showcase. The Ukrainian duo, known for their deep house and melodic techno soundscapes, will headline what is expected to be the largest event of the season. Taking place amidst th jungle surroundings of Zamna Cenote, this party promises a festival-like atmosphere with world-class production, immersive visuals, and an unforgettable lineup.

Why You Should Attend

If you’re looking for the biggest and most high-energy New Year’s Eve event in Tulum, ARTBAT’s Upperground is the ultimate choice. With thousands of attendees expected and top-tier sound systems, this event delivers the true festival experience.

Key Details

  • Venue: Zamna Cenote
  • Tickets: Starting at $100 USD
  • Time: Doors open at 10 PM until sunrise
  • Tickets: zamnafestival.com
  • Tables: Whatsapp

NYE Parties with Dinner

Vagalume NYE 2025 (Selling Fast)

Vagalume Tulum, one of the most iconic venues in Tulum’s Hotel Zone. This year, Vagalume brings you an unforgettable evening featuring an extended B2B set by Sébastien Léger and Roy Rosenfeld, promising deep, soulful beats that will keep you moving all night. Alongside this world-class music lineup, indulge in a gourmet dinner experience, prepared by top chefs Adriana Resinas Hernández and Marco Estrada, offering a blend of bold, flavorful dishes.

Whether you choose to enjoy dinner, general admission, or table service, this event combines exceptional music, food, and ambiance, making it one of the top NYE destinations in Tulum.

Why You Should Attend

Vagalume’s perfect beachfront location, vibrant atmosphere, and carefully curated lineup make it an unmissable NYE celebration. With options for both dining and dancing, it’s the ideal spot to enjoy a seamless blend of luxury, music, and celebration.

Key Details

  • Venue: Vagalume
  • Tickets: Starting from $110 USD
  • Open Bar: Dinner tickets include open bar from 7PM to 10PM
  • Time: Dinner seating at 7 PM, GA starting 9PM
  • Tickets & Tables : Vagalume NYE

UMi – A Taste of PARACAS

UMi’s New Year’s Eve celebration offers a unique blend of Peruvian-inspired cuisine and vibrant festivities. This event marks the introduction of PARACAS, UMi’s upcoming concept celebrating Peru’s rich culinary heritage. Begin the evening with a sound healing session at 6 PM, followed by a six-course dinner featuring dishes like Ponja Ceviche, Lomo Saltado, and Dark Chocolate Tart, paired with sparkling wine and 12 grapes for the traditional New Year’s toast. After dinner, enjoy live music transitioning into an energizing DJ set, with access to an after-party starting at 5:30 AM.

Why You Should Attend:
UMi combines a sophisticated dining experience with Tulum’s lively spirit, making it the perfect spot to welcome 2025. The fusion of culture, flavors, sound healing and music creates a celebration that’s as unique as the first sunrise of the year.

Key Details

  • Venue: Umi
  • Tickets: Starting from $200 USD + 15% Service Fee (Prices includes access to the afterparty starting 5am)
  • Time:  Sound Healing starting 6PM, Dinner seating at 7 PM.
  • ‍Tickets & Tables : Umi NYE

Papaya Playa Project NYE 2025 (Selling Fast)

Step into an evening of introspection, appreciation, and renewal at Papaya Playa Project's New Year’s Eve 2025 celebration. Honoring ancestral traditions and cleansing energies, this unforgettable night invites you to prepare your soul for a new cycle while enjoying the perfect blend of music, culinary artistry, and meaningful connections. The music journey, curated by Damian Lazarus, Goldcap, and Honeyluv, sets the tone for an unforgettable NYE celebration, ensuring you welcome 2025 with renewed energy and inspiration. Relish a multi-course dinner on the beach, meticulously curated by a guest chef, followed by a climactic countdown ceremony to bid farewell to 2024 and embrace the new year.

Why You Should Attend

This event seamlessly combines Tulum’s natural beauty with gourmet dining and top-tier music. Whether dining or dancing, it’s the perfect way to welcome 2025.

Key Details

  • Venue: Papaya Playa Project
  • Tickets: Starting from $5610 MXN
  • Time: NYE Ceremony 7 PM, GA 9 PM, Last Entry 1 AM
  • Tickets: PPP NYE
  • ‍Tables: Whatsapp

Gitano Jungle NYE 2025

Gitano Jungle is hosting its iconic Gypsy Disco Dinner & Dancing celebration for New Year’s Eve. Set in the jungle venue, the event features a curated four-course Modern Mexican menu, paired with champagne and mezcal cocktails. Guests can enjoy performances by international Afro House DJ 4RAIN, resident DJ THE VERSA, and a live Gitano Jungle Cabaret show.

Why You Should Attend

Gitano Jungle perfectly combines elegance, celebration, and Tulum’s bohemian vibe. With world-class dining and unforgettable entertainment, this event offers a glamorous way to start 2025. Whether you’re a returning fan of the Gypsy Disco or a first-time attendee, this is a night you won’t want to miss.

Key Details

  • Venue: Gitano Jungle
  • Tickets: Starting at $5,000 MXN
  • Time: Starting at 8 PM
  • Tickets: Gitano Jungle NYE
  • Tables: Whatsapp

Gitano Beach NYE 2025

Gitano Beach Tulum, set against the backdrop of Tulum’s pristine shoreline near the Sian Ka’an nature reserve. Enjoy a carefully curated four-course dinner menu, paired with craft cocktails and champagne, followed by live entertainment and DJs sets to keep the energy alive as you welcome 2025 in style.

Why You Should Attend

Gitano Beach is perfect for those seeking a chic beachside celebration. With its delicious Modern Mexican cuisine, impeccable service, and stunning ocean views, this event offers an elevated yet fun atmosphere to mark the start of the new year. Whether you come for the dinner or the party, Gitano Beach promises a memorable NYE experience.

Key Details

  • Venue: Gitano Beach
  • Tickets: Dinner packages starting at $4,000 MXN
  • Time: Starting 6 PM
  • Tickets & Bottles Service: Gitano Beach NYE

Ahau’s Legendary NYE Celebration

Celebrate New Year’s Eve in style at Ahau Tulum, one of the Riviera Maya’s most iconic beachfront destinations. Returning for its 14th edition, this event combines a gourmet dinner curated by Chef Arturo Eslava with vibrant music and an open bar, creating an immersive experience for all attendees. Dance under the stars and soak in the enchanting atmosphere with friends as Ahau delivers an unforgettable night.

Why You Should Attend
Ahau’s NYE celebration is the perfect blend of exquisite dining, world-class music, and beachfront charm. Featuring performances by Savage & SHē, Dean Walker, Kid Bamboo, K8, and Mee · Kay, this event offers something for everyone in an elegant, yet energetic setting.

Key Details

  • Venue: Ahau
  • Tickets: Starting at $5,060 MXN
  • Time: Starting 8 PM
  • Tickets & Bottles Service: Ahau NYE

Exclusive Dinner Experiences

Bagatelle Tulum NYE 2025

Celebrate NYE in style at Bagatelle Tulum with a gourmet dinner. Known for its French Riviera-inspired atmosphere, this event offers a carefully curated 5-course menu featuring dishes like lobster tartar and Wagyu tenderloin, complemented by live music and entertainment.

Why You Should Attend

Bagatelle is globally renowned, with locations in Saint-Tropez, London, and Miami. This NYE, indulge in world-class dining and lively celebrations in one of Tulum’s most exclusive venues.

Key Details

  • Venue: Bagatelle Tulum
  • Tickets: Starting at $10,000 MXN per person
  • Time: Dinner from 8 PM
  • Dinner: Bagatelle NYE

Mia Tulum NYE Dinner 2025

Mía invites you to a special evening featuring a five-course gourmet dinner, paired with premium wines and champagne to toast the night away. As the evening progresses, the vibe shifts with live DJs and entertainment, making it a night of seamless transitions from fine dining to vibrant dancing by the beach.

Set in one of Tulum’s most stunning locations, Mía Beach Club promises an evening of refined elegance and lively celebration, offering a perfect blend of sophistication and fun.

Why You Should Attend:

Mía Beach Club is the ideal choice for those seeking a beachfront setting to welcome the new year. With its exquisite five-course menu, premium drinks, and energetic entertainment, this event caters to both fine-dining enthusiasts and party lovers.

First Dinner Seating

  • Time: 6:00 PM to 8:30 PM
  • Price: $98 per person (+15% service charge)
  • Inclusions: A delightful four-course dinner designed to please all palates.
  • Optional Upgrade: Add access to the party with a welcome drink for an additional $100 USD.
  • Note: This seating is family-friendly, and children are welcome.

Second Dinner Seating

  • Time: 9:00 PM onwards
  • Price: $275 per person (+15% service charge)
  • Inclusions: A sumptuous five-course dinner, entrance to the NYE party, and a welcome drink.
  • Note: This seating is exclusively for adults, creating a sophisticated atmosphere to ring in the New Year.

Tickets and Dinner at Mia NYE

Mia Tulum NYE Party 2025

Celebrate the arrival of 2025 at Mía Tulum, hosting its much-anticipated New Year’s Eve Party. This beachfront celebration combines the magic of live performances, vibrant rhythms, and an unmatched Tulum vibe for a night to remember.

Dance under the stars to performances by:

  • Lauren Mia, delivering her signature melodic and emotive soundscapes.
  • Ôona Dahl, known for her ethereal and experimental electronic beats.
  • Calypsis, bringing dynamic energy to keep the party alive.

Tickets for Mia NYE Party

Ilios Tulum NYE Dinner 2025

Transport yourself to Greece with Ilios’ New Year’s Eve celebration, featuring authentic Mediterranean cuisine and live entertainment, including fire shows and plate-breaking traditions. A night full of flavor, culture, and joy.

Why You Should Attend

Ilios combines world-class dining with unique cultural traditions, offering an unforgettable NYE experience in Tulum.

Key Details

  • Venue: Ilios Tulum
  • Price: Starting at 5500 MXN per person
  • Time: Dinner begins at 7 PM
  • Dinner: Ilios Dinner NYE

Others NYE Celebrations

Set Sail into 2025 with Highly Catered!

Celebrate New Year’s Eve in style aboard our luxury yacht party! Enjoy delicious food, premium drinks, a live DJ, and stunning sunset views as we sail into the New Year.
Key Details

  • Venue: Private Yacht
  • Location: Puerto Aventuras (Tulum transportation included)
  • Tickets: Starting at $300 USD
  • Time: 2:00 PM – 6:00 PM
  • Tickets: High Tyde by Highly Catered

Bonbonniere Tulum NYE 2025

Bonbonniere Tulum invites you to an upscale, high-energy New Year’s Eve celebration in the heart of the Hotel Zone. Known for its opulent interiors and vibrant after-hours atmosphere, this nightclub is the go-to spot for luxury and exclusivity. While the lineup hasn’t been announced, expect top-tier DJs and a glamorous crowd ready to welcome 2025 in style.

Why You Should Attend

If you’re seeking an elite nightlife experience with world-class music and chic vibes, Bonbonniere is the place to be. Its late-night hours (open until 5 AM) make it the perfect destination for those who want to keep the party going long after the countdown.

Key Details

  • Venue: Bonbonniere Tulum
  • Tickets: Starting at $1,000 MXN
  • Time: Doors open at 10 PM
  • Tickets & Tables: Bonbonniere NYE

NYE Celebrations at Amansala Chica

Music Under The Stars NYE Celebration at Amansala Chica in Tulum with J.POOL and Special Guests Pascale Caristo, Shane Carling, Xa.Monika .Join your Soul Family for an Evening of Community, Connection, Expression, and Incredible Music All Night!

WEAR WHITE ATTIRE (not mandatory but suggested)

Enter the New Year in an Intentional and Conscious way surrounded with your Soul Tribe and Family at this booze free event!

Key Details

  • Venue: Amansala Chica
  • Tickets: Starting at $97 USD
  • Time: Doors open at 8 PM
  • Tickets: Nye at Amansala

Rosa Negra Group NYE Celebrations 2025

The Rosa Negra Group is renowned for delivering unforgettable New Year’s Eve celebrations across its high-end venues. Whether you’re looking for an elegant dinner or a lively atmosphere filled with music and entertainment, each venue offers something unique. Known for their exceptional cuisine and vibrant ambiance, Rosa Negra’s venues are some of the most sought-after spots for ringing in the new year.

Venues to Choose From:

  • Rosa Negra Tulum – A vibrant celebration featuring Latin American flavors and energetic percussion shows.
  • Tora Tulum – Elegant Japanese-inspired dining with Wagyu beef specialties and curated cocktails.
  • Taboo Tulum – Mediterranean cuisine paired with live entertainment, ideal for a glamorous NYE evening.
  • Parole Tulum – Italian fine dining with live music and an enchanting ambiance.
  • Funky Geisha Tulum – A playful fusion of Asian flavors and a dynamic party atmosphere.
  • Tantra Tulum – A luxurious Indian-inspired venue offering a vibrant mix of exotic flavors and captivating entertainment.

Why You Should Attend

Rosa Negra Group’s venues offer a blend of exceptional dining and vibrant entertainment, perfect for groups, couples, or anyone looking to celebrate in style. With each venue delivering a unique experience, there’s an option for every taste—whether you prefer Mediterranean, Japanese, Latin, or Asian-inspired cuisine.

Key Details

  • Prices: 6000 MXN per person
  • How to Book: Send us a message on WhatsApp to reserve your spot at any of these incredible venues.

Wrapping Up Tulum NYE 2025

Tulum New Year’s Eve 2025 is shaping up to be an unforgettable celebration, with events ranging from jungle parties to luxurious dinners and vibrant beach club celebrations. Whether you’re drawn to the immersive experience of Zamna, the elegance of Bagatelle, or the bohemian charm of Gitano Jungle, Tulum offers something for everyone to ring in the new year.

en.postBody:
This post is for NYE events for 2024 if you are looking to know what new years even parties will take this year make sure to to check out our Tulum NYE 2025 Parties post!

‍

Tulum New Years 2024

During the final days of the year, Tulum becomes a lively destination with a variety of New Year's Eve celebrations. Here's what's on the horizon for Tulum NYE 2024:

Dinner and Open Bar at Ahau

Ahau Tulum's NYE 2024 Celebration features a dinner with an open bar, the perfect place to kickstart your night before heading to all night event like Zamna or Papaya Playa Project.

The night unfolds with doors opening at 7:00 pm and dinner served at 8:00 pm. At 10:00 pm, the real celebration begins, and their open bar pours the best drinks until 1 am. Don't forget the dress part is mandatory white tribal attire. This event is where friends become family, and you ring in the new year in style!

Music By:

  • Dinner and Open Bar - $485 USD (Limited Sale with Wine Pairing Included)
  • Open Bar - $200 USD ($140 Limited Sale)
  • Chilren Menu - $100 USD

Buy Tickets for Ahau Tulum

‍

New Year's Eve Tulum 2024 at Papaya Playa Project

For those looking to welcome the New Year with a blend of culinary and entertainment, the Gratitude Season event at Papaya Playa Project offers a great option. The evening begins with a welcome cocktail, setting the stage for a series of live performances. As the night unfolds, guests will be treated to a special dinner, each dish a testament to the culinary expertise of the chefs. It's a one-seating affair, ensuring that diners share this gastronomic journey with their chosen company.

For those opting for the NYE ticket, the doors open at 10 pm, inviting guests to dive into the music journey. While the dinner is exclusive to the Dinner Ticket holders, the NYE ticket holders will still be part of the NYE Ceremony, a celebration of music and connection.

PPP Lineup: Acid Pauli, Kalabrese, Caleesi & Sarah Kreis, More Tba.

Party Tickets:

  • Just Party Locals: $125 USD (Sold Out)
  • Just Party Tier 2: $250 USD (Sold Out)
  • Just Party Final Tier: $325 USD (Sold Out)
  • Dinner & Party $800 USD

Tickets to Papaya Playa Project

PPP Gastronomic Experience With Rafa Zafra

Papaya Playa Project extends invitations to a unique New Year's Eve celebration, featuring Chef Rafa Zafra, a renowned chef with experience in Michelin-starred restaurants. The event focuses on honoring the land's products through a creative gastronomic experience, blending cuisine, culture, and entertainment. The night includes a midnight beach ceremony with world-class performances and music, welcoming the new year. This immersive experience promises to be unforgettable with dancing till dawn.

Dinner Experience includes PPP Party:

  • Dinner & Party $800 USD

More information and Tickets to PPP Gastronomic Experience

‍

Zamna NYE Presents: Paul Kalkbrenner Live

Zamna Tulum is known for its immersive jungle experience, and this NYE, they're hosting techno maestro Paul Kalkbrenner. The event is expected to provide a lively and enjoyable start to the new year, combining elements of nature and music. Tickets are available for general admission, and there are VIP options for those seeking a more enhanced experience.

Zamna NYE Lineup: Paul Kalkbrenner, Camelphat, Agents Of Time, Henri Bergmann, Armonica, Silver Panda, The Element, Toto Chiavetta, Wurtz

Tickets:

  • GENERAL 2nd Release: $140 USD
  • VIP 1st Release: $300 USD

Set Underground’s New Years Eve Cenote Experience (Exclusive 15% OFF)

'The Midnight Sparkle Mirage,' a sensational NYE bash at Cerveceria Tulum by SET Underground. This event, inspired by the vibrant spirit of Burning Man, features interactive art stations, fire performances, and midnight fireworks. Located at a beautiful cenote this event will go until noon, perfect place to keep dancing to great music. Dont forget to save 15% by using the code "TULUMBIBLE"

‍
Set Underground NYE Lineup: Bora Uzer, Deer Jade, Sam Shure, Stephan Jolk

Location: Cervecería Tulum - Address: Carretera Cancun - Chetumal Km 230 Frente a Parque Tankah, 77789 Tulum, Q.R., Mexico

Tickets:

  • GENERAL 2nd Release Girls: (Sold Out)
  • GENERAL 3rd Release: $110 USD
  • VIP Early Bird: (Sold Out)
  • VIP Tier 1 (Sold Out)
  • VIP Tier 2 - $250 USD
  • AAA + Open Bar: $500 USD

Get your tickets for Set Underground

USE THE CODE "TULUMBIBLE" to save 15%

‍

NYE at Gitano Jungle Tulum 2024

Gitano Tulum invites guests to a Celestial New Year's Eve celebration in the heart of the Tulum jungle. The evening promises a sparkling and glamorous experience with dinner and dancing under the stars. Guests can enjoy a special four-course menu paired with Champagne, signature Mezcal cocktails, and the famed Gypsy-Disco music and entertainment. Dinner and dancing packages are available based on seating area and time, with a limited number of seats offered at a special price for early bookings.

Gitano Lineup: Salon Acapulco, Omar Vera, The Versa and Surprise Live Performances

Tickets:

  • DINNER & DANCING - First Seating: $305 USD
  • DINNER & DANCING - Bottle Service: $670 USD
  • VIP - Moon Roof Dinner: $620 USD
  • VIP - Jungle Room Dinner: $1035 USD

Reserve your spot at Gitano NYE

NYE at Gitano Beach

Gitano Beach invites you to a glamorous evening of dinner and dancing beachside at their new location. Guests will be treated to a special four-course menu complemented by Champagne, the establishment's signature Mezcal cocktails, and a captivating live Flamenco performance. Following the show, under the shimmering disco ball, attendees can dance the night away to the alluring tunes of MËSTIZA.

MËSTIZA renowned for their infectious mixes and seductive melodies, is composed of two celebrated Spanish artists. Their unique fusion of electronic music and traditional flamenco creates a mesmerizing sound that effortlessly moves both hearts and bodies.

DRESS CODE: Celestial Glam

Gitano Lineup: MËSTIZA

Tickets:

  • General Admission Tier 1 (SOLD OUT)
  • General Admission Tier 2 $110 USD
  • Sunset Dinner Tier 1 $160 USD
  • Dinner and Dancing Tier 1: $265 USD

Reserve your spot at Gitano Beach

‍

NYE Party Tulum 2024 at Vagalume with Sasha

The NYE Celebrations at Vagalume kicks off at 8:00 PM with a formal beach dress code, setting the tone for a chic and memorable evening. As the sun sets, Sasha will elevate the atmosphere. The dinner service concludes at 10:00 PM, but the celebration continues. Enjoy an open bar from 8:00 PM to 10:00 PM, and toast to new beginnings with new friends and old.

Try a a special New Year's menu that includes:

  • Oysters with coriander sauce, reduced lemon juice, chaya pesto, and guajillo oil.
  • A Lobster Crunchy Roll with crustacean and habanero mayonnaise, served with a coriander dip.
  • Red snapper loin accompanied by caviar and a saffron-coconut sauce, garnished with tender herbs.
  • Lamb Chops with a pumpkin seed sauce alongside a mix of local pumpkins.
  • An exotic Chocolate & Caramel cake filled with surprises.

Tickets:

  • Dinner: (Sold Out)
  • Party Early Bird: (Sold Out)
  • Party Tier 1: (Sold Out)
  • Party Tier 2: (Sold Out)
  • Party Tier 3: $195 USD

Tickets for Vagalume

‍

New Years Party at Mia Beachclub

MIA Tulum's New Year's Eve Party from 8 PM to 2 AM, offers a lineup with Rafael Cerato and James Zabiela. Entry prices begin at 1,350 MXN for early birds, 3,450 MXN for Tier 1, and 4,600 MXN for the Final Tier, each including one welcome drink. This does not include dinner to purchase dinner options please look at the option above.

Mia Party Lineup: Rafael Cerato, James Zabiela, Jordan John, and Resident DJs

Tickets:

  • Early Bird: $77 USD (Sold Out)
  • First Tier: $200 USD
  • Final Tier: $265 USD

Tickets for NYE Party at Mia

‍

New Years Dinner at Mia Beach Club

MIA Tulum is hosting a New Year's Eve dinner and its a great option for those looking to celebrate NYE on Tulum Beach. It includes an early seating option from 6:00 PM to 8:30 PM suitable for families, and a second seating from 9:00 PM for adults, featuring a four-course meal and party entry. Prices range from 1,800 MXN to 5,112 MXN, plus service charges, with live music and international cuisine on offer. No refunds for cancellations or no-shows.

Tickets:

  • First Seating: (SOLD OUT)
  • First Seating + Party: (SOLD OUT)
  • Second Seating: (SOLD OUT)

Tickets for Dinner are SOLD OUT

‍

New Year's Eve at Bagatelle Tulum 2024

Celebrate the arrival of 2024 in style at Bagatelle Tulum, where a sumptuous New Year's Eve dinner awaits.The event promises an intimate indoor setting, starting at 8 pm and stretching late into the night. The menu is for a fine dining experience, starting with an "amuse-bouche" of Foie Gras with vanilla and sapote negro confit, paired with crispy spices. The first course, "pour commencer", features golden seared scallops with red squash risotto and Kristal caviar juice. Following this is a main course, "a suivre", consisting of grilled Wagyu beef fillet with a truffled melanosporum souffléed potato. The "douceurs" section offers a dessert of Champagne Baba with thick cream, fig leaf, and cherry confit. For the final touch, "mignardises" includes a mango macaron, Clementine Financier, and white chocolate truffle. The menu is from Bagatelle Tulum, suggesting an upscale dining venue with a focus on luxurious ingredients and complex flavors.

Tickets:

  • Dinner for 2: $17,400 MXN + 15% service (Sold Out)
  • Dinner for 3: $26,100 MXN + 15% service (Sold Out)
  • Dinner for 4: $34,800 MXN + 15% service (Sold Out)
  • Dinner for 6: $52,200 MXN + 15% service (Sold Out)
  • Dinner for 12: $136,620 MXN + 15% service (Sold Out)

Bagatelle NYE IS Sold Out

‍

NYE Dinner at Vesica Cenote

Second Anniversary and New Year's Eve Dinner at Vesica.

Guests are invited to enjoy the magical atmosphere that the arrival of the New Year brings. Surrounded by the purifying energy of Vesica's cenote, guests will enjoy live music during dinner, be enchanted by the performances of dancers and artists, and explore the charming artisan market.

Vesica's 8-course dinner is already SOLD OUT, however you can still purchase open bar at the door. Enjoy NYE surrounded by the purifying energy of Vesica's cenote.

Open Bar is a great option to pre-drink for anyone who is going to Zamna as its located between Tulum Downtown and Zamna

Tickets:

  • Open Bar (Available at the door)

es.postBody:
This post is for NYE events for 2024 if you are looking to know what new years even parties will take this year make sure to to check out our Tulum NYE 2025 Parties post!

‍

Tulum New Years 2024

During the final days of the year, Tulum becomes a lively destination with a variety of New Year's Eve celebrations. Here's what's on the horizon for Tulum NYE 2024:

Dinner and Open Bar at Ahau

Ahau Tulum's NYE 2024 Celebration features a dinner with an open bar, the perfect place to kickstart your night before heading to all night event like Zamna or Papaya Playa Project.

The night unfolds with doors opening at 7:00 pm and dinner served at 8:00 pm. At 10:00 pm, the real celebration begins, and their open bar pours the best drinks until 1 am. Don't forget the dress part is mandatory white tribal attire. This event is where friends become family, and you ring in the new year in style!

Music By:

  • Dinner and Open Bar - $485 USD (Limited Sale with Wine Pairing Included)
  • Open Bar - $200 USD ($140 Limited Sale)
  • Chilren Menu - $100 USD

Buy Tickets for Ahau Tulum

‍

New Year's Eve Tulum 2024 at Papaya Playa Project

For those looking to welcome the New Year with a blend of culinary and entertainment, the Gratitude Season event at Papaya Playa Project offers a great option. The evening begins with a welcome cocktail, setting the stage for a series of live performances. As the night unfolds, guests will be treated to a special dinner, each dish a testament to the culinary expertise of the chefs. It's a one-seating affair, ensuring that diners share this gastronomic journey with their chosen company.

For those opting for the NYE ticket, the doors open at 10 pm, inviting guests to dive into the music journey. While the dinner is exclusive to the Dinner Ticket holders, the NYE ticket holders will still be part of the NYE Ceremony, a celebration of music and connection.

PPP Lineup: Acid Pauli, Kalabrese, Caleesi & Sarah Kreis, More Tba.

Party Tickets:

  • Just Party Locals: $125 USD (Sold Out)
  • Just Party Tier 2: $250 USD (Sold Out)
  • Just Party Final Tier: $325 USD (Sold Out)
  • Dinner & Party $800 USD

Tickets to Papaya Playa Project

PPP Gastronomic Experience With Rafa Zafra

Papaya Playa Project extends invitations to a unique New Year's Eve celebration, featuring Chef Rafa Zafra, a renowned chef with experience in Michelin-starred restaurants. The event focuses on honoring the land's products through a creative gastronomic experience, blending cuisine, culture, and entertainment. The night includes a midnight beach ceremony with world-class performances and music, welcoming the new year. This immersive experience promises to be unforgettable with dancing till dawn.

Dinner Experience includes PPP Party:

  • Dinner & Party $800 USD

More information and Tickets to PPP Gastronomic Experience

‍

Zamna NYE Presents: Paul Kalkbrenner Live

Zamna Tulum is known for its immersive jungle experience, and this NYE, they're hosting techno maestro Paul Kalkbrenner. The event is expected to provide a lively and enjoyable start to the new year, combining elements of nature and music. Tickets are available for general admission, and there are VIP options for those seeking a more enhanced experience.

Zamna NYE Lineup: Paul Kalkbrenner, Camelphat, Agents Of Time, Henri Bergmann, Armonica, Silver Panda, The Element, Toto Chiavetta, Wurtz

Tickets:

  • GENERAL 2nd Release: $140 USD
  • VIP 1st Release: $300 USD

Set Underground’s New Years Eve Cenote Experience (Exclusive 15% OFF)

'The Midnight Sparkle Mirage,' a sensational NYE bash at Cerveceria Tulum by SET Underground. This event, inspired by the vibrant spirit of Burning Man, features interactive art stations, fire performances, and midnight fireworks. Located at a beautiful cenote this event will go until noon, perfect place to keep dancing to great music. Dont forget to save 15% by using the code "TULUMBIBLE"

‍
Set Underground NYE Lineup: Bora Uzer, Deer Jade, Sam Shure, Stephan Jolk

Location: Cervecería Tulum - Address: Carretera Cancun - Chetumal Km 230 Frente a Parque Tankah, 77789 Tulum, Q.R., Mexico

Tickets:

  • GENERAL 2nd Release Girls: (Sold Out)
  • GENERAL 3rd Release: $110 USD
  • VIP Early Bird: (Sold Out)
  • VIP Tier 1 (Sold Out)
  • VIP Tier 2 - $250 USD
  • AAA + Open Bar: $500 USD

Get your tickets for Set Underground

USE THE CODE "TULUMBIBLE" to save 15%

‍

NYE at Gitano Jungle Tulum 2024

Gitano Tulum invites guests to a Celestial New Year's Eve celebration in the heart of the Tulum jungle. The evening promises a sparkling and glamorous experience with dinner and dancing under the stars. Guests can enjoy a special four-course menu paired with Champagne, signature Mezcal cocktails, and the famed Gypsy-Disco music and entertainment. Dinner and dancing packages are available based on seating area and time, with a limited number of seats offered at a special price for early bookings.

Gitano Lineup: Salon Acapulco, Omar Vera, The Versa and Surprise Live Performances

Tickets:

  • DINNER & DANCING - First Seating: $305 USD
  • DINNER & DANCING - Bottle Service: $670 USD
  • VIP - Moon Roof Dinner: $620 USD
  • VIP - Jungle Room Dinner: $1035 USD

Reserve your spot at Gitano NYE

NYE at Gitano Beach

Gitano Beach invites you to a glamorous evening of dinner and dancing beachside at their new location. Guests will be treated to a special four-course menu complemented by Champagne, the establishment's signature Mezcal cocktails, and a captivating live Flamenco performance. Following the show, under the shimmering disco ball, attendees can dance the night away to the alluring tunes of MËSTIZA.

MËSTIZA renowned for their infectious mixes and seductive melodies, is composed of two celebrated Spanish artists. Their unique fusion of electronic music and traditional flamenco creates a mesmerizing sound that effortlessly moves both hearts and bodies.

DRESS CODE: Celestial Glam

Gitano Lineup: MËSTIZA

Tickets:

  • General Admission Tier 1 (SOLD OUT)
  • General Admission Tier 2 $110 USD
  • Sunset Dinner Tier 1 $160 USD
  • Dinner and Dancing Tier 1: $265 USD

Reserve your spot at Gitano Beach

‍

NYE Party Tulum 2024 at Vagalume with Sasha

The NYE Celebrations at Vagalume kicks off at 8:00 PM with a formal beach dress code, setting the tone for a chic and memorable evening. As the sun sets, Sasha will elevate the atmosphere. The dinner service concludes at 10:00 PM, but the celebration continues. Enjoy an open bar from 8:00 PM to 10:00 PM, and toast to new beginnings with new friends and old.

Try a a special New Year's menu that includes:

  • Oysters with coriander sauce, reduced lemon juice, chaya pesto, and guajillo oil.
  • A Lobster Crunchy Roll with crustacean and habanero mayonnaise, served with a coriander dip.
  • Red snapper loin accompanied by caviar and a saffron-coconut sauce, garnished with tender herbs.
  • Lamb Chops with a pumpkin seed sauce alongside a mix of local pumpkins.
  • An exotic Chocolate & Caramel cake filled with surprises.

Tickets:

  • Dinner: (Sold Out)
  • Party Early Bird: (Sold Out)
  • Party Tier 1: (Sold Out)
  • Party Tier 2: (Sold Out)
  • Party Tier 3: $195 USD

Tickets for Vagalume

‍

New Years Party at Mia Beachclub

MIA Tulum's New Year's Eve Party from 8 PM to 2 AM, offers a lineup with Rafael Cerato and James Zabiela. Entry prices begin at 1,350 MXN for early birds, 3,450 MXN for Tier 1, and 4,600 MXN for the Final Tier, each including one welcome drink. This does not include dinner to purchase dinner options please look at the option above.

Mia Party Lineup: Rafael Cerato, James Zabiela, Jordan John, and Resident DJs

Tickets:

  • Early Bird: $77 USD (Sold Out)
  • First Tier: $200 USD
  • Final Tier: $265 USD

Tickets for NYE Party at Mia

‍

New Years Dinner at Mia Beach Club

MIA Tulum is hosting a New Year's Eve dinner and its a great option for those looking to celebrate NYE on Tulum Beach. It includes an early seating option from 6:00 PM to 8:30 PM suitable for families, and a second seating from 9:00 PM for adults, featuring a four-course meal and party entry. Prices range from 1,800 MXN to 5,112 MXN, plus service charges, with live music and international cuisine on offer. No refunds for cancellations or no-shows.

Tickets:

  • First Seating: (SOLD OUT)
  • First Seating + Party: (SOLD OUT)
  • Second Seating: (SOLD OUT)

Tickets for Dinner are SOLD OUT

‍

New Year's Eve at Bagatelle Tulum 2024

Celebrate the arrival of 2024 in style at Bagatelle Tulum, where a sumptuous New Year's Eve dinner awaits.The event promises an intimate indoor setting, starting at 8 pm and stretching late into the night. The menu is for a fine dining experience, starting with an "amuse-bouche" of Foie Gras with vanilla and sapote negro confit, paired with crispy spices. The first course, "pour commencer", features golden seared scallops with red squash risotto and Kristal caviar juice. Following this is a main course, "a suivre", consisting of grilled Wagyu beef fillet with a truffled melanosporum souffléed potato. The "douceurs" section offers a dessert of Champagne Baba with thick cream, fig leaf, and cherry confit. For the final touch, "mignardises" includes a mango macaron, Clementine Financier, and white chocolate truffle. The menu is from Bagatelle Tulum, suggesting an upscale dining venue with a focus on luxurious ingredients and complex flavors.

Tickets:

  • Dinner for 2: $17,400 MXN + 15% service (Sold Out)
  • Dinner for 3: $26,100 MXN + 15% service (Sold Out)
  • Dinner for 4: $34,800 MXN + 15% service (Sold Out)
  • Dinner for 6: $52,200 MXN + 15% service (Sold Out)
  • Dinner for 12: $136,620 MXN + 15% service (Sold Out)

Bagatelle NYE IS Sold Out

‍

NYE Dinner at Vesica Cenote

Second Anniversary and New Year's Eve Dinner at Vesica.

Guests are invited to enjoy the magical atmosphere that the arrival of the New Year brings. Surrounded by the purifying energy of Vesica's cenote, guests will enjoy live music during dinner, be enchanted by the performances of dancers and artists, and explore the charming artisan market.

Vesica's 8-course dinner is already SOLD OUT, however you can still purchase open bar at the door. Enjoy NYE surrounded by the purifying energy of Vesica's cenote.

Open Bar is a great option to pre-drink for anyone who is going to Zamna as its located between Tulum Downtown and Zamna

Tickets:

  • Open Bar (Available at the door)
es.postSummary: As the calendar turns to the final page, Tulum transforms into a vibrant destination for celebrations, offering a diverse array of New Year's Eve festivities.

en.h1Title: Top Tulum Parties and Events this February
en.metaDescription: This February, Tulum's nights come alive! From Bonbonniere's late parties to Papaya Playa's Full Moon magic, and Vagalume's eclectic beats. Join the fun with Piknik's chill vibes, Visionari's beach beats, and more. Don't miss out on Tulum's best parties!
en.metaTitle: Top Tulum Parties and Events this February
en.name: Best February Parties in Tulum
en.postBody:
Best Parties in Tulum this February

This February, Tulum is buzzing with an exciting parties. From the only after-hours spot, Bonbonniere, blending high-end club vibes with a dance floors, to Papaya Playa Project's famous Full Moon Parties. Vagalume this year is a hub of activity with everything from the intimate Sinner nights to the afro beats of Summerians and the house grooves of Ten Ibiza.

Make sure to visit our events page for latest additions and up-to-date parties.

‍

Cenote Techno Party from Radical

Few minutes out of Tulum, in the jungle and cenote, a party arriving with the focus on connection and music. This event brings the iconic sounds of Berlin's Berghain and Panorama Bar into the nature of Tulum. Equipped with the Funktion1 sound system, it promises an immersive afterparty experience.

February 10, 2024

‍

Bonbonniere

Bonbonniere Tulum is the only nightclub in Tulum, open until 5 am. Located in the hotel zone and close to popular spots like Bagatelle and Vagalume, it's the perfect afterparty venue. Bonbonniere combines luxury with a lively atmosphere, offering VIP tables and bottle service alongside a vibrant dance floor, making it appealing to both the elite and those who love to dance. Its high-end sound system and an exciting lineup of world-class artists such as Seth Troxler and Maceo Plex, ensure an unmatched nightlife experience that blends high-end luxury with the joy of dancing.

February 02, 2024 AHMED SPINS

February 04, 2024 CALUSSA

February 09, 2024 JENIA TARSOL

February 10, 2024 NIK FANCUIULLI

February 23, 2024 HYENAH

February 24, 2024 TOM & COLLINS

February 17, 2024 AGUSTO YEPES

February 16, 2024 NICO RAC

‍

Papaya Playa Project

Papaya Playa Project (PPP) is where Tulum's breathtaking natural beauty blends seamlessly with eco-conscious luxury. This boutique hotel and beach club is designed for those who seek an unforgettable experience that truly embodies the essence of Tulum, prioritizing sustainability without sacrificing comfort.

Full Moon Parties

Papaya Playa Project is famous for its vibrant full moon parties, making it a top spot to spend your Saturday nights. Picture yourself dancing beneath the Caribbean stars, with the soothing sound of waves in the background. As the moon climbs higher, the night buzzes with a special kind of energy, drawing everyone closer in a shared celebration of life's beauty and the magic of the universe. Full Moon parties usually start at 10pm and go until 3am.

February 03, 2024 RODRIGUEZ JR & ANSTASCIA

February 10, 2024 SOUL CLAP & EZGI

February 17, 2024 GUY GERBER

February 24, 2024 ART DEPARTMENT

‍

‍

‍
Vagalume Tulum

Vagalume Tulum Beach Club stands out as a luxurious yet relaxed beachfront destination, open from Tuesday to Sunday, from 11 am to 1 am. It offers the perfect blend of relaxation by day on its beautiful beach and vibrant parties by night. The club is celebrated for its dynamic music scene, hosting renowned DJs like Monolink, Massano, and Hernan Cattaneo, and featuring popular parties from Ibiza such as Ten Ibiza and Summarians, infusing Tulum with international house and techno music.

Sinner

Every Tuesday at Vagalume, boutique party by Miganova and Vite.

MIGANOVA, an Italian music producer with roots in Barcelona and a current base in Tulum, is known for his unique blend of emotional pads and danceable sounds that mix depth with spontaneity, offering a fresh array of unique sounds. Alongside him, VITE, an electronic music enthusiast and the musical director of Vagalume Tulum, is celebrated for his distinctive and varied musical selections that create a unique and invigorating atmosphere on the dance floor. Together, these talented artists are the driving forces behind the Sinner event at Vagalume Tulum, where their collective expertise and passion for electronic music converge to create an unforgettable experience that captivates the international electronic music community.

February 06, 2024 AVANGART TABLDOT

February 13, 2024 NOTRE DAME

February 20, LAST MEN ON EARTH

MORE TBA

Summerians

Every Thursday at Vagalume Melodic Afro Music.

Kintar brings his acclaimed Summerians universe back to Vagalume Tulum for the third year, promising the most exciting night in town. This event, which has also captivated audiences in Ibiza, Bali, Dubai, New York, Miami, Phuket, and Sardinia, is not to be missed. Summerians, with its unique blend of Melodic Afro and Ethnic House music, invites you to an immersive musical journey on Thursdays in February. It's a call to awaken your inner self and connect with your ancient spirit.

February 08, 2024

February 15, 2024

February 22, 2024

February 29, 2024

Ten Ibiza

Every Friday at Vagalume, Journey into House Music.

Dive into the heart of Ibiza's vibrant music scene with Oriol Calvo at TEN IBIZA, an event that showcases one of the island's most revered artists. With a rich history spanning over a decade, Oriol has become synonymous with the best of Ibiza's club life, holding residencies at iconic venues like Space Ibiza and Privilege, as well as enchanting beach clubs such as Jockey Club Salinas and Nassau Beach Club.

February 02, 2024 MEXI MERAKI VALDERRAMA

February 09, 2024 DJUMA SOUNDSYSTEM

February 16, 2024 CJ JEFF & MARIAN ARISS

February 23, 2024 RAYCO SANTOS & ANDREA CASTELLS

Piknik

Every Saturday at Vagalume, Piknik offers a day vibe that is unparalleled.

Piknik features exceptionally curated music, a rich gastronomic culture, and crafted cocktails. A local designers market is hosted at the venue, where the dance floor becomes a melting pot for colorful souls seeking authenticity. This happy gathering is known for bringing together the freshest national and international talent, creating blissful and delicious day vibes that seamlessly transition into the night.

February 03, 2024 IÑIGO VONTIER

February 24, 2024 JOSE NOVETA

February 10, 2024 LEX ATHENS

February 17, 2024 YUKSEK

Visionari

On February 4th and 11th, you are invited to join a unique beach event where music meets spirituality under the stars. The evening features a DJ set, live music, and breathwork sessions by the shore, along with a cleansing ceremony to uplift spirits. You can also explore cosmic makeup, tarot readings, and astrology insights. There's a bohemian market full of unique finds, live djembe music, captivating performances, and the Tekio installation, all set against the natural backdrop of the beach.

February 04, 2024

February 11, 2024

Ancora

Originating from the heart of Paris, ANCORA stands as a dynamic gathering of music lovers, creating an arena where bonds are formed and the rhythmic pulse resonates with a sense of togetherness. Our mission is to produce events globally that connect individuals through music. For our inaugural event in Tulum, we are excited to host DARMON & JAALEX.

February 14, 2024

Mellow by Ramyen

Mellow provides a unique gathering by blending vibrant and lively decor with meticulously curated artists who feel like family. This bond has manifested in two triumphant residencies in both Paris and St- Tropez.

February 07, 2024

Pendulum by Steve Lawler

PENDULUM, the brainchild of Steve Lawler and a concept inspired by the unique vibes of Tulum, has finally found its perfect venue at the stunning Vagalume. This monthly residency is set to feature Steve Lawler himself playing extended sets, complemented by a rotating lineup of guest DJs setting the stage each month.

Steve Lawler is a name that resonates deeply in the electronic music world, known for his exceptional talent and influence. His career, which started with organizing legendary motorway raves under the M42 in the early '90s, has seen him ascend to the pinnacle of the industry. Lawler is an artist who transcends genre limitations, celebrated equally by fans and peers for his musical prowess.

February 17, 2024 JESSE ZOTTI

Casa Jaguar

Casa Jaguar stands out as the go-to spot for anyone craving a true Tulum dining experience. Nestled in the hotel zone, this open-air eatery and bar boasts a lively jungle-chic vibe, complemented by top-notch culinary and beverage offerings.

UNKNOWN DESIRE By Rythmia

This event invites you to a sensory awakening, surrounded by the allure of mythical creatures and the vibrant pulse of their desires expressed through dance. As the night unfolds, let yourself be captivated by the eclectic beats from an impressive lineup featuring HOLDER of Good Manners and Mayan Warrior, S.O.T.A, and the dynamic duo VALDERRAMA B2B BALMORI, with a special performance by SAXXDOC.

February 03, 2024 HOLDER

en.metaDescription: Essential emergency contact information for Tulum, Mexico. Find phone numbers for police, medical services, consulates, and more. Plus, get safety tips for a worry-free trip.
en.name: Emergency Contacts in Tulum
en.postBody:
When visiting or residing in Tulum, knowing the key emergency contact numbers is crucial for ensuring safety and getting timely help when needed. Below is a list of important emergency services, medical facilities, and consulates available in Tulum, Mexico.

Emergency Numbers

  • 911: This is the general emergency number in Mexico and can be used to request police, medical, or fire assistance.

en.name: Airlines Flying to Tulum's Upcoming Airport
en.postBody:
Tulum, the rapidly growing gem of the Riviera Maya, is now easier to reach than ever with the opening of the Tulum International Airport (Felipe Carrillo Puerto Airport) on December 1st, 2023. This modern travel hub will accommodate millions of passengers annually and offers convenient access to Tulum's stunning beaches and cultural attractions.

Important Facts about Tulum Airport

  • Capacity:  Designed to handle up to 5.5 million travelers per year across an estimated 32,000 flights.
  • Location: Strategically situated just a 40-minute drive from Tulum's downtown area.
  • Military Connection: Also houses a military airbase for enhanced security in the region.
  • Future Rail Link:  Plans are in motion to connect the airport to the Tren Maya end of August, boosting regional transportation options.

Airlines Serving Tulum Airport

Travelers have a fantastic array of airline options when flying to Tulum. Here's a breakdown of where you can connect from:

  • Mexico: Aeromexico, VivaAerobus, Mexicana de Aviación and Volaris offer convenient links from Mexico City, Monterrey, Guadalajara, and Tijuana.
  • United States:  American Airlines, Delta, JetBlue, United, and Spirit Airlines (despite the recent postponement) provide direct routes from hubs like  Atlanta, New York, Miami, Chicago, Los Angeles, Fort Lauderdale, and Orlando.
  • Canada: Canadians can enjoy direct flights with Air Canada, departing from Toronto and Montreal.
  • Europe: Discover Airlines (part of the Lufthansa Group) offers a seamless connection from Frankfurt, Germany.
  • Central America: Copa Airlines links Tulum with Panama City, providing access for travelers across the region.

Amenities

Tulum International Airport is still relatively new. While it currently features one terminal and a streamlined traveler experience, expect additional amenities, shops, and dining options to develop over time.

Transportation to and from the Airport

  • ADO & More: ADO, Mexico's reliable bus operator, offers direct service between the Tulum International Airport and downtown Tulum for approximately $290 Mexican pesos. Taxis and private shuttle services are also available.
  • Parking: The airport provides overnight parking. The rate is $155 MXN + IVA per night.  You'll need proof of insurance, official identification, and your vehicle registration for parking. Payment is made at the Authorities Complex next to the terminal.

Important Things to Remember

  • Plan Ahead: Flight schedules are subject to change.  Verify flight details directly with your airline before departure.
  • Peak Season Tip:  Book your flights and transportation in advance, especially during high-demand seasons.
  • Overtourism Considerations: Tulum's rising popularity brings the potential for overtourism. Visitors are encouraged to be mindful of sustainability and support local businesses to help maintain the area's unique character.

Flight Schedules and Changes

The travel industry is constantly evolving, and airlines may adjust their schedules or routes with relatively short notice. We strive to keep this table updated with the most current information on airlines serving Tulum International Airport. However, there's always a chance that some details might change.  To ensure a seamless travel experience,  we recommend visiting the official websites of your chosen airline and Tulum International Airport (if available) for the latest flight schedules and confirmation of your itinerary.

Here are some recent updates to be aware of:

  • Spirit Airlines:  Unfortunately, Spirit Airlines has postponed its planned service to Tulum. Be sure to check their website for updates or rebooking options if you were previously booked on a Spirit flight to Tulum.
  • VivaAerobus: VivaAerobus has streamlined its Mexico City service to Tulum, offering two daily flights from the newly opened Felipe Ángeles International Airport (AIFA)  instead of Benito Juarez International Airport (AICM).

{{flights-table="/components"}}

We hope this information helps with your trip planning!

en.h1Title: Mayan Warrior Tulum has a new location
en.metaDescription: Mayan Warrior returns to Tulum on January 9, 2026, with a special edition at Zamna. Get all the details about this immersive experience and how to secure your tickets before they sell out.
en.metaTitle: Mayan Warrior Tulum has a new location
en.name: Mayan Warrior Announces Return to Tulum Now at Zamna
en.postBody:
In an exciting twist for the 2026 season, Mayan Warrior—one of the most iconic names in global festival culture—has announced that their return to Tulum will take place at Zamna. Scheduled for January 9, 2026, this marks a significant move from their previous home at Tehmplo, bringing their immersive experience into the heart of one of the region’s most renowned jungle venues.

Mayan Warrior, born out of the Burning Man ethos, is known not just for its music, but for the visual and communal world it creates. With its structures, intricate stage builds, and its signature art car—recently reimagined after a devastating fire—the collective represents a rare blend of ancestral energy and future-forward creativity. For many, attending a Mayan Warrior event is not just a party but a ceremony of sound, light, and intention.

This shift to Zamna signals a new chapter. The venue's capacity for high-level production and its accessibility to both travelers and locals makes it an ideal canvas for Mayan Warrior’s vision.

Beyond the music, what continues to set Mayan Warrior apart is the experience it curates and a diverse community that gathers not just to dance—but to connect. In many ways, its arrival in Tulum each year feels like a homecoming, grounding the ethereal energy of electronic music within the sacred landscape of the Riviera Maya.

Tickets for Mayan Warrior at Zamna go on sale Thursday, June 19, and will be available directly through us. As always, we recommend securing them early—this is one of the most anticipated nights of the season, and it never stays a secret for long.

Stay tuned for more details, and prepare for a night where the jungle pulses to the rhythm of something truly extraordinary.
